  #⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w = ?b
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
?b =
mon_lassociator (x ⊗ y1) y2 (z ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ y1) #⊗ mon_rassociator y2 z w
· identity (x ⊗ y1)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V y2 z #⊗ identity w)
· identity (x ⊗ y1) #⊗ mon_lassociator z y2 w
· mon_rassociator (x ⊗ y1) z (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator (x ⊗ y1) z (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator x y1 (z ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
· identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator y1 z (y2 ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ y1 ⊗ z, y2, w}
· identity x
  #⊗ (((pr12 V) y1 z #⊗ identity y2) #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
mon_lassociator x y1 y2 #⊗ identity (z ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator x (y1 ⊗ y2) (z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator (y1 ⊗ y2) z w
· identity x
  #⊗ (mon_lassociator y1 y2 z #⊗ identity w)
· identity x
  #⊗ ((identity y1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 z)
      #⊗ identity w)
· identity x
  #⊗ (mon_rassociator y1 z y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x
  #⊗ ((sym_mon_braiding V y1 z #⊗ identity y2)
      #⊗ identity w)
· identity x
  #⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w = ?b
 
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
mon_lassociator x y1 y2 #⊗ identity (z ⊗ w)
· (mon_lassociator x (y1 ⊗ y2) (z ⊗ w)
   · (identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator (y1 ⊗ y2) z w
      · (identity x
         #⊗ (mon_lassociator y1 y2 z #⊗ identity w)
         · (identity x
            #⊗ ((identity y1
                 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 z)
                #⊗ identity w)
            · (identity x
               #⊗ (mon_rassociator y1 z y2
                   #⊗ identity w)
               · (identity x
                  #⊗ ((sym_mon_braiding V y1 z
                       #⊗ identity y2) #⊗ identity w)
                  · (identity x
                     #⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2
                         #⊗ identity w)
                     · (identity x
                        #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2)
                             w
                        · (mon_rassociator x z
                             (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
                           · identity (x ⊗ z)
                             #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2
                                  w))))))))) = ?b

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
identity x #⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· (identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
   · (mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
      · identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w)) =
?t2

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
identity x #⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w = ?t2

      exact cohe1. 
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
mon_lassociator x y1 y2 #⊗ identity (z ⊗ w)
· (mon_lassociator x (y1 ⊗ y2) (z ⊗ w)
   · (identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator (y1 ⊗ y2) z w
      · (identity x
         #⊗ (mon_lassociator y1 y2 z #⊗ identity w)
         · (identity x
            #⊗ ((identity y1
                 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 z)
                #⊗ identity w)
            · (identity x
               #⊗ (mon_rassociator y1 z y2
                   #⊗ identity w)
               · (identity x
                  #⊗ ((sym_mon_braiding V y1 z
                       #⊗ identity y2) #⊗ identity w)
                  · (identity x
                     #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
                     · identity x
                       #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1
                            (y2 ⊗ w)
                     · mon_rassociator x z
                         (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))))))))) =
mon_lassociator (x ⊗ y1) y2 (z ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ y1) #⊗ mon_rassociator y2 z w
· identity (x ⊗ y1)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V y2 z #⊗ identity w)
· identity (x ⊗ y1) #⊗ mon_lassociator z y2 w
· mon_rassociator (x ⊗ y1) z (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator (x ⊗ y1) z (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator x y1 (z ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
· identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator y1 z (y2 ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ y1 ⊗ z, y2, w}
· identity x
  #⊗ (((pr12 V) y1 z #⊗ identity y2) #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
mon_lassociator x y1 y2 #⊗ identity (z ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator x (y1 ⊗ y2) (z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator (y1 ⊗ y2) z w
· identity x
  #⊗ (mon_lassociator y1 y2 z #⊗ identity w)
· identity x
  #⊗ ((identity y1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 z)
      #⊗ identity w)
· identity x
  #⊗ (mon_rassociator y1 z y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x
  #⊗ ((sym_mon_braiding V y1 z #⊗ identity y2)
      #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w)) =
mon_lassociator (x ⊗ y1) y2 (z ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ y1) #⊗ mon_rassociator y2 z w
· identity (x ⊗ y1)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V y2 z #⊗ identity w)
· identity (x ⊗ y1) #⊗ mon_lassociator z y2 w
· mon_rassociator (x ⊗ y1) z (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator (x ⊗ y1) z (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator x y1 (z ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
· identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator y1 z (y2 ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ y1 ⊗ z, y2, w}
· identity x
  #⊗ (((pr12 V) y1 z #⊗ identity y2) #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
mon_lassociator x y1 y2 #⊗ identity (z ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator x (y1 ⊗ y2) (z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator (y1 ⊗ y2) z w
· identity x
  #⊗ (mon_lassociator y1 y2 z #⊗ identity w)
· identity x
  #⊗ ((identity y1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 z)
      #⊗ identity w)
· identity x
  #⊗ (mon_rassociator y1 z y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x
  #⊗ ((sym_mon_braiding V y1 z #⊗ identity y2)
      #⊗ identity w) =
mon_lassociator (x ⊗ y1) y2 (z ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ y1) #⊗ mon_rassociator y2 z w
· identity (x ⊗ y1)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V y2 z #⊗ identity w)
· identity (x ⊗ y1) #⊗ mon_lassociator z y2 w
· mon_rassociator (x ⊗ y1) z (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator (x ⊗ y1) z (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator x y1 (z ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
· identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator y1 z (y2 ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ y1 ⊗ z, y2, w}
· identity x
  #⊗ (((pr12 V) y1 z #⊗ identity y2) #⊗ identity w)

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
mon_lassociator x y1 y2 #⊗ identity (z ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator x (y1 ⊗ y2) (z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator (y1 ⊗ y2) z w
· identity x
  #⊗ (mon_lassociator y1 y2 z #⊗ identity w)
· identity x
  #⊗ ((identity y1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 z)
      #⊗ identity w)
· identity x
  #⊗ (mon_rassociator y1 z y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x
  #⊗ ((sym_mon_braiding V y1 z #⊗ identity y2)
      #⊗ identity w) = ?b
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
?b =
mon_lassociator (x ⊗ y1) y2 (z ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ y1) #⊗ mon_rassociator y2 z w
· identity (x ⊗ y1)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V y2 z #⊗ identity w)
· identity (x ⊗ y1) #⊗ mon_lassociator z y2 w
· mon_rassociator (x ⊗ y1) z (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator (x ⊗ y1) z (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator x y1 (z ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
· identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator y1 z (y2 ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ y1 ⊗ z, y2, w}
· identity x
  #⊗ (((pr12 V) y1 z #⊗ identity y2) #⊗ identity w)

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
?b =
mon_lassociator (x ⊗ y1) y2 (z ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ y1) #⊗ mon_rassociator y2 z w
· identity (x ⊗ y1)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V y2 z #⊗ identity w)
· identity (x ⊗ y1) #⊗ mon_lassociator z y2 w
· mon_rassociator (x ⊗ y1) z (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator (x ⊗ y1) z (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator x y1 (z ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
· identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator y1 z (y2 ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ y1 ⊗ z, y2, w}
· identity x
  #⊗ (((pr12 V) y1 z #⊗ identity y2) #⊗ identity w)
 
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
?y =
mon_lassociator (x ⊗ y1) y2 (z ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ y1) #⊗ mon_rassociator y2 z w
· identity (x ⊗ y1)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V y2 z #⊗ identity w)

         
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
?y =
mon_lassociator (x ⊗ y1) y2 (z ⊗ w)
· (identity (x ⊗ y1) #⊗ mon_rassociator y2 z w
   · identity (x ⊗ y1)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V y2 z #⊗ identity w))

         
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
?t1 =
identity (x ⊗ y1)
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V y2 z #⊗ identity w)

         
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
?t1 =
(identity x #⊗ identity y1)
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V y2 z #⊗ identity w)

         
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =

· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
?t1 = ?b
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
?b =
(identity x #⊗ identity y1)
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V y2 z #⊗ identity w)

         
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
?b =
(identity x #⊗ identity y1)
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V y2 z #⊗ identity w)
 
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
aux: (identity x #⊗ identity y1)
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V y2 z #⊗ identity w)
· mon_lassociator x y1 (z ⊗ y2 ⊗ w) =
mon_lassociator x y1 (y2 ⊗ z ⊗ w)
· identity x
  #⊗ (identity y1
      #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V y2 z #⊗ identity w))
?b =
(identity x #⊗ identity y1)
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V y2 z #⊗ identity w)

              
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
aux: mon_lassociator x y1 (y2 ⊗ z ⊗ w)
· identity x
  #⊗ (identity y1
      #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V y2 z #⊗ identity w))
· inv_from_z_iso
    (z_iso_from_associator_iso V x y1
       (z ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)) =
(identity x #⊗ identity y1)
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V y2 z #⊗ identity w)
?b =
(identity x #⊗ identity y1)
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V y2 z #⊗ identity w)

              
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
aux: mon_lassociator x y1 (y2 ⊗ z ⊗ w)
· identity x
  #⊗ (identity y1
      #⊗ ((pr12 V) y2 z #⊗ identity w))
· αinv^{ V }_{ x, y1, z ⊗ y2 ⊗ w} =
(identity x #⊗ identity y1)
#⊗ ((pr12 V) y2 z #⊗ identity w)
?b =
(identity x #⊗ identity y1)
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V y2 z #⊗ identity w)

              exact aux.
         
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
?t1 =
mon_lassociator x y1 (y2 ⊗ z ⊗ w)
· identity x
  #⊗ (identity y1 #⊗ ((pr12 V) y2 z #⊗ identity w))
· αinv^{ V }_{ x, y1, z ⊗ y2 ⊗ w}

         
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
?y =
mon_lassociator x y1 (y2 ⊗ z ⊗ w)
· identity x
  #⊗ (identity y1 #⊗ ((pr12 V) y2 z #⊗ identity w))

         
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
?t1 = identity y1 #⊗ ((pr12 V) y2 z #⊗ identity w)

         
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
aux: (identity y1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 z)
#⊗ identity w · mon_lassociator y1 (z ⊗ y2) w =
mon_lassociator y1 (y2 ⊗ z) w
· identity y1
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V y2 z #⊗ identity w)
?t1 = identity y1 #⊗ ((pr12 V) y2 z #⊗ identity w)

         
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
aux: inv_from_z_iso
  (z_iso_from_associator_iso V y1 (y2 ⊗ z) w)
· ((identity y1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 z)
   #⊗ identity w · mon_lassociator y1 (z ⊗ y2) w) =
identity y1
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V y2 z #⊗ identity w)
?t1 = identity y1 #⊗ ((pr12 V) y2 z #⊗ identity w)

         
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
aux: αinv^{ V }_{ y1, y2 ⊗ z, w}
· ((identity y1 #⊗ (pr12 V) y2 z) #⊗ identity w
   · mon_lassociator y1 (z ⊗ y2) w) =
identity y1 #⊗ ((pr12 V) y2 z #⊗ identity w)
?t1 = identity y1 #⊗ ((pr12 V) y2 z #⊗ identity w)

         exact aux.
    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
mon_lassociator x y1 y2 #⊗ identity (z ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator x (y1 ⊗ y2) (z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator (y1 ⊗ y2) z w
· identity x
  #⊗ (mon_lassociator y1 y2 z #⊗ identity w)
· identity x
  #⊗ ((identity y1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 z)
      #⊗ identity w)
· identity x
  #⊗ (mon_rassociator y1 z y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x
  #⊗ ((sym_mon_braiding V y1 z #⊗ identity y2)
      #⊗ identity w) =
mon_lassociator (x ⊗ y1) y2 (z ⊗ w)
· (identity (x ⊗ y1) #⊗ mon_rassociator y2 z w
   · (mon_lassociator x y1 (y2 ⊗ z ⊗ w)
      · identity x
        #⊗ (αinv^{ V }_{ y1, y2 ⊗ z, w}
            · ((identity y1 #⊗ (pr12 V) y2 z)
               #⊗ identity w
               · mon_lassociator y1 (z ⊗ y2) w))
      · αinv^{ V }_{ x, y1, z ⊗ y2 ⊗ w}))
· identity (x ⊗ y1) #⊗ mon_lassociator z y2 w
· mon_rassociator (x ⊗ y1) z (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator (x ⊗ y1) z (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator x y1 (z ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
· identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator y1 z (y2 ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ y1 ⊗ z, y2, w}
· identity x
  #⊗ (((pr12 V) y1 z #⊗ identity y2) #⊗ identity w)

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
mon_lassociator x y1 y2 #⊗ identity (z ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator x (y1 ⊗ y2) (z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator (y1 ⊗ y2) z w
· identity x
  #⊗ (mon_lassociator y1 y2 z #⊗ identity w)
· identity x
  #⊗ ((identity y1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 z)
      #⊗ identity w)
· identity x
  #⊗ (mon_rassociator y1 z y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x
  #⊗ ((sym_mon_braiding V y1 z #⊗ identity y2)
      #⊗ identity w) =
mon_lassociator (x ⊗ y1) y2 (z ⊗ w)
· (identity (x ⊗ y1) #⊗ mon_rassociator y2 z w
   · (mon_lassociator x y1 (y2 ⊗ z ⊗ w)
      · (identity x #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ y1, y2 ⊗ z, w}
         · (identity x
            #⊗ ((identity y1 #⊗ (pr12 V) y2 z)
                #⊗ identity w)
            · identity x
              #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 (z ⊗ y2) w))
      · αinv^{ V }_{ x, y1, z ⊗ y2 ⊗ w}))
· identity (x ⊗ y1) #⊗ mon_lassociator z y2 w
· mon_rassociator (x ⊗ y1) z (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator (x ⊗ y1) z (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator x y1 (z ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
· identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator y1 z (y2 ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ y1 ⊗ z, y2, w}
· identity x
  #⊗ (((pr12 V) y1 z #⊗ identity y2) #⊗ identity w)

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
mon_lassociator x y1 y2 #⊗ identity (z ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator x (y1 ⊗ y2) (z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator (y1 ⊗ y2) z w
· identity x
  #⊗ (mon_lassociator y1 y2 z #⊗ identity w)
· identity x
  #⊗ ((identity y1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 z)
      #⊗ identity w)
· identity x
  #⊗ (mon_rassociator y1 z y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x
  #⊗ ((sym_mon_braiding V y1 z #⊗ identity y2)
      #⊗ identity w) =
mon_lassociator (x ⊗ y1) y2 (z ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ y1) #⊗ mon_rassociator y2 z w
· mon_lassociator x y1 (y2 ⊗ z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ y1, y2 ⊗ z, w}
· identity x
  #⊗ ((identity y1 #⊗ (pr12 V) y2 z) #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 (z ⊗ y2) w
· αinv^{ V }_{ x, y1, z ⊗ y2 ⊗ w}
· identity (x ⊗ y1) #⊗ mon_lassociator z y2 w
· mon_rassociator (x ⊗ y1) z (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator (x ⊗ y1) z (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator x y1 (z ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
· identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator y1 z (y2 ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ y1 ⊗ z, y2, w}
· identity x
  #⊗ (((pr12 V) y1 z #⊗ identity y2) #⊗ identity w)

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
mon_lassociator x y1 y2 #⊗ identity (z ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator x (y1 ⊗ y2) (z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator (y1 ⊗ y2) z w
· identity x
  #⊗ (mon_lassociator y1 y2 z #⊗ identity w)
· identity x
  #⊗ ((identity y1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 z)
      #⊗ identity w)
· identity x
  #⊗ (mon_rassociator y1 z y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x
  #⊗ ((sym_mon_braiding V y1 z #⊗ identity y2)
      #⊗ identity w) =
mon_lassociator (x ⊗ y1) y2 (z ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ y1) #⊗ mon_rassociator y2 z w
· mon_lassociator x y1 (y2 ⊗ z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ y1, y2 ⊗ z, w}
· identity x
  #⊗ ((identity y1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 z)
      #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 (z ⊗ y2) w
· αinv^{ V }_{ x, y1, z ⊗ y2 ⊗ w}
· identity (x ⊗ y1) #⊗ mon_lassociator z y2 w
· mon_rassociator (x ⊗ y1) z (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator (x ⊗ y1) z (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator x y1 (z ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
· identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator y1 z (y2 ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ y1 ⊗ z, y2, w}
· identity x
  #⊗ (((pr12 V) y1 z #⊗ identity y2) #⊗ identity w)

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
mon_lassociator x y1 y2 #⊗ identity (z ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator x (y1 ⊗ y2) (z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator (y1 ⊗ y2) z w
· identity x
  #⊗ (mon_lassociator y1 y2 z #⊗ identity w) =
mon_lassociator (x ⊗ y1) y2 (z ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ y1) #⊗ mon_rassociator y2 z w
· mon_lassociator x y1 (y2 ⊗ z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ y1, y2 ⊗ z, w}
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
cohe2: mon_lassociator x y1 y2 #⊗ identity (z ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator x (y1 ⊗ y2) (z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator (y1 ⊗ y2) z w
· identity x
  #⊗ (mon_lassociator y1 y2 z #⊗ identity w) =
mon_lassociator (x ⊗ y1) y2 (z ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ y1) #⊗ mon_rassociator y2 z w
· mon_lassociator x y1 (y2 ⊗ z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ y1, y2 ⊗ z, w}
mon_lassociator x y1 y2 #⊗ identity (z ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator x (y1 ⊗ y2) (z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator (y1 ⊗ y2) z w
· identity x
  #⊗ (mon_lassociator y1 y2 z #⊗ identity w)
· identity x
  #⊗ ((identity y1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 z)
      #⊗ identity w)
· identity x
  #⊗ (mon_rassociator y1 z y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x
  #⊗ ((sym_mon_braiding V y1 z #⊗ identity y2)
      #⊗ identity w) =
mon_lassociator (x ⊗ y1) y2 (z ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ y1) #⊗ mon_rassociator y2 z w
· mon_lassociator x y1 (y2 ⊗ z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ y1, y2 ⊗ z, w}
· identity x
  #⊗ ((identity y1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 z)
      #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 (z ⊗ y2) w
· αinv^{ V }_{ x, y1, z ⊗ y2 ⊗ w}
· identity (x ⊗ y1) #⊗ mon_lassociator z y2 w
· mon_rassociator (x ⊗ y1) z (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator (x ⊗ y1) z (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator x y1 (z ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
· identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator y1 z (y2 ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ y1 ⊗ z, y2, w}
· identity x
  #⊗ (((pr12 V) y1 z #⊗ identity y2) #⊗ identity w)

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
mon_lassociator x y1 y2 #⊗ identity (z ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator x (y1 ⊗ y2) (z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator (y1 ⊗ y2) z w
· identity x
  #⊗ (mon_lassociator y1 y2 z #⊗ identity w) =
mon_lassociator (x ⊗ y1) y2 (z ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ y1) #⊗ mon_rassociator y2 z w
· mon_lassociator x y1 (y2 ⊗ z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ y1, y2 ⊗ z, w}

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
mon_lassociator (x ⊗ y1) y2 (z ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ y1) #⊗ mon_rassociator y2 z w
· mon_lassociator x y1 (y2 ⊗ z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ y1, y2 ⊗ z, w} =
mon_lassociator x y1 y2 #⊗ identity (z ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator x (y1 ⊗ y2) (z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator (y1 ⊗ y2) z w
· identity x
  #⊗ (mon_lassociator y1 y2 z #⊗ identity w)

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
mon_lassociator (x ⊗ y1) y2 (z ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ y1) #⊗ mon_rassociator y2 z w
· mon_lassociator x y1 (y2 ⊗ z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ y1, y2 ⊗ z, w} = ?b
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
?b =
mon_lassociator x y1 y2 #⊗ identity (z ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator x (y1 ⊗ y2) (z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator (y1 ⊗ y2) z w
· identity x
  #⊗ (mon_lassociator y1 y2 z #⊗ identity w)

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
mon_lassociator (x ⊗ y1) y2 (z ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ y1) #⊗ mon_rassociator y2 z w
· mon_lassociator x y1 (y2 ⊗ z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ y1, y2 ⊗ z, w} = ?b

        
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
mon_lassociator (x ⊗ y1) y2 (z ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ y1) #⊗ mon_rassociator y2 z w
· mon_lassociator x y1 (y2 ⊗ z ⊗ w) = ?y'

        
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
mon_lassociator (x ⊗ y1) y2 (z ⊗ w)
· (identity (x ⊗ y1) #⊗ mon_rassociator y2 z w
   · mon_lassociator x y1 (y2 ⊗ z ⊗ w)) = ?y'

        
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
mon_lassociator (x ⊗ y1) y2 (z ⊗ w)
· ((identity x #⊗ identity y1)
   #⊗ mon_rassociator y2 z w
   · mon_lassociator x y1 (y2 ⊗ z ⊗ w)) = ?y'

        
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
mon_lassociator (x ⊗ y1) y2 (z ⊗ w)
· (mon_lassociator x y1 (y2 ⊗ (z ⊗ w))
   · identity x
     #⊗ (identity y1 #⊗ mon_rassociator y2 z w)) = 
?y'

        
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
mon_lassociator (x ⊗ y1) y2 (z ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator x y1 (y2 ⊗ (z ⊗ w))
· identity x
  #⊗ (identity y1 #⊗ mon_rassociator y2 z w) = ?y'

        
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
mon_lassociator x y1 y2 #⊗ identity (z ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator x (y1 ⊗ y2) (z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 (z ⊗ w)
· identity x
  #⊗ (identity y1 #⊗ mon_rassociator y2 z w) = ?y'

        apply idpath.
      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
mon_lassociator x y1 y2 #⊗ identity (z ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator x (y1 ⊗ y2) (z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 (z ⊗ w)
· identity x
  #⊗ (identity y1 #⊗ mon_rassociator y2 z w)
· identity x #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ y1, y2 ⊗ z, w} =
mon_lassociator x y1 y2 #⊗ identity (z ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator x (y1 ⊗ y2) (z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator (y1 ⊗ y2) z w
· identity x
  #⊗ (mon_lassociator y1 y2 z #⊗ identity w)

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
mon_lassociator x y1 y2 #⊗ identity (z ⊗ w)
· (mon_lassociator x (y1 ⊗ y2) (z ⊗ w)
   · (identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 (z ⊗ w)
      · (identity x
         #⊗ (identity y1 #⊗ mon_rassociator y2 z w)
         · identity x #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ y1, y2 ⊗ z, w}))) =
mon_lassociator x y1 y2 #⊗ identity (z ⊗ w)
· (mon_lassociator x (y1 ⊗ y2) (z ⊗ w)
   · (identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator (y1 ⊗ y2) z w
      · identity x
        #⊗ (mon_lassociator y1 y2 z #⊗ identity w)))

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 (z ⊗ w)
· (identity x
   #⊗ (identity y1 #⊗ mon_rassociator y2 z w)
   · identity x #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ y1, y2 ⊗ z, w}) =
identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator (y1 ⊗ y2) z w
· identity x
  #⊗ (mon_lassociator y1 y2 z #⊗ identity w)

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator y1 y2 (z ⊗ w)
    · (identity y1 #⊗ mon_rassociator y2 z w
       · αinv^{ V }_{ y1, y2 ⊗ z, w})) =
identity x
#⊗ (mon_rassociator (y1 ⊗ y2) z w
    · mon_lassociator y1 y2 z #⊗ identity w)

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
mon_lassociator y1 y2 (z ⊗ w)
· (identity y1 #⊗ mon_rassociator y2 z w
   · αinv^{ V }_{ y1, y2 ⊗ z, w}) =
mon_rassociator (y1 ⊗ y2) z w
· mon_lassociator y1 y2 z #⊗ identity w

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
identity (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (z ⊗ w))
· (mon_lassociator y1 y2 (z ⊗ w)
   · (identity y1 #⊗ mon_rassociator y2 z w
      · αinv^{ V }_{ y1, y2 ⊗ z, w})) =
mon_rassociator (y1 ⊗ y2) z w
· mon_lassociator y1 y2 z #⊗ identity w

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
mon_rassociator (y1 ⊗ y2) z w
· mon_lassociator (y1 ⊗ y2) z w
· (mon_lassociator y1 y2 (z ⊗ w)
   · (identity y1 #⊗ mon_rassociator y2 z w
      · αinv^{ V }_{ y1, y2 ⊗ z, w})) =
mon_rassociator (y1 ⊗ y2) z w
· mon_lassociator y1 y2 z #⊗ identity w

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =

· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
mon_rassociator (y1 ⊗ y2) z w
· (mon_lassociator (y1 ⊗ y2) z w
   · (mon_lassociator y1 y2 (z ⊗ w)
      · (identity y1 #⊗ mon_rassociator y2 z w
         · αinv^{ V }_{ y1, y2 ⊗ z, w}))) =
mon_rassociator (y1 ⊗ y2) z w
· mon_lassociator y1 y2 z #⊗ identity w

· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))

· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))

· identity y1 #⊗ mon_rassociator y2 z w
· αinv^{ V }_{ y1, y2 ⊗ z, w} =

· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =

#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =

· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
mon_lassociator y1 y2 z #⊗ identity w
· (mon_lassociator y1 (y2 ⊗ z) w
   · (identity y1 #⊗ mon_lassociator y2 z w
      · (identity y1 #⊗ mon_rassociator y2 z w
         · αinv^{ V }_{ y1, y2 ⊗ z, w}))) =

V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
mon_lassociator y1 y2 z #⊗ identity w
· (mon_lassociator y1 (y2 ⊗ z) w
   · (identity y1 #⊗ mon_lassociator y2 z w
      · (identity y1 #⊗ mon_rassociator y2 z w
         · αinv^{ V }_{ y1, y2 ⊗ z, w}))) =
mon_lassociator y1 y2 z #⊗ identity w
· identity ((y1 ⊗_{ V} (y2 ⊗ z)) ⊗_{ V} w)

x, y1, y2, z, w: V

#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
mon_lassociator y1 (y2 ⊗ z) w
· (identity y1 #⊗ mon_lassociator y2 z w
   · (identity y1 #⊗ mon_rassociator y2 z w
      · αinv^{ V }_{ y1, y2 ⊗ z, w})) =
identity ((y1 ⊗_{ V} (y2 ⊗ z)) ⊗_{ V} w)

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
mon_lassociator y1 (y2 ⊗ z) w
· (identity y1 #⊗ mon_lassociator y2 z w
   · (identity y1 #⊗ mon_rassociator y2 z w
      · αinv^{ V }_{ y1, y2 ⊗ z, w})) = ?b
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
?b = identity ((y1 ⊗_{ V} (y2 ⊗ z)) ⊗_{ V} w)

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
mon_lassociator y1 (y2 ⊗ z) w
· (identity y1 #⊗ mon_lassociator y2 z w
   · (identity y1 #⊗ mon_rassociator y2 z w
      · αinv^{ V }_{ y1, y2 ⊗ z, w})) = ?b

        
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
identity y1 #⊗ mon_lassociator y2 z w
· (identity y1 #⊗ mon_rassociator y2 z w
   · αinv^{ V }_{ y1, y2 ⊗ z, w}) = ?t2

        
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
identity y1 #⊗ mon_lassociator y2 z w
· identity y1 #⊗ mon_rassociator y2 z w
· αinv^{ V }_{ y1, y2 ⊗ z, w} = ?t2

        
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
identity y1
#⊗ (mon_lassociator y2 z w · mon_rassociator y2 z w)
· αinv^{ V }_{ y1, y2 ⊗ z, w} = ?t2

        
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
identity y1 #⊗ identity (y2 ⊗ z ⊗ w)
· αinv^{ V }_{ y1, y2 ⊗ z, w} = ?t2

        
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
identity (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ z ⊗ w))
· αinv^{ V }_{ y1, y2 ⊗ z, w} = ?t2

        apply id_left.
      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
mon_lassociator y1 (y2 ⊗ z) w
· αinv^{ V }_{ y1, y2 ⊗ z, w} =
identity ((y1 ⊗_{ V} (y2 ⊗ z)) ⊗_{ V} w)

      apply mon_lassociator_rassociator.
    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
cohe2: mon_lassociator x y1 y2 #⊗ identity (z ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator x (y1 ⊗ y2) (z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator (y1 ⊗ y2) z w
· identity x
  #⊗ (mon_lassociator y1 y2 z #⊗ identity w) =
mon_lassociator (x ⊗ y1) y2 (z ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ y1) #⊗ mon_rassociator y2 z w
· mon_lassociator x y1 (y2 ⊗ z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ y1, y2 ⊗ z, w}
mon_lassociator x y1 y2 #⊗ identity (z ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator x (y1 ⊗ y2) (z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator (y1 ⊗ y2) z w
· identity x
  #⊗ (mon_lassociator y1 y2 z #⊗ identity w)
· identity x
  #⊗ ((identity y1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 z)
      #⊗ identity w)
· identity x
  #⊗ (mon_rassociator y1 z y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x
  #⊗ ((sym_mon_braiding V y1 z #⊗ identity y2)
      #⊗ identity w) =
mon_lassociator (x ⊗ y1) y2 (z ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ y1) #⊗ mon_rassociator y2 z w
· mon_lassociator x y1 (y2 ⊗ z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ y1, y2 ⊗ z, w}
· identity x
  #⊗ ((identity y1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 z)
      #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 (z ⊗ y2) w
· αinv^{ V }_{ x, y1, z ⊗ y2 ⊗ w}
· identity (x ⊗ y1) #⊗ mon_lassociator z y2 w
· mon_rassociator (x ⊗ y1) z (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator (x ⊗ y1) z (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator x y1 (z ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
· identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator y1 z (y2 ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ y1 ⊗ z, y2, w}
· identity x
  #⊗ (((pr12 V) y1 z #⊗ identity y2) #⊗ identity w)

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
cohe2: mon_lassociator x y1 y2 #⊗ identity (z ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator x (y1 ⊗ y2) (z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator (y1 ⊗ y2) z w
· identity x
  #⊗ (mon_lassociator y1 y2 z #⊗ identity w) =
mon_lassociator (x ⊗ y1) y2 (z ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ y1) #⊗ mon_rassociator y2 z w
· mon_lassociator x y1 (y2 ⊗ z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ y1, y2 ⊗ z, w}
mon_lassociator x y1 y2 #⊗ identity (z ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator x (y1 ⊗ y2) (z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator (y1 ⊗ y2) z w
· identity x
  #⊗ (mon_lassociator y1 y2 z #⊗ identity w)
· identity x
  #⊗ ((identity y1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 z)
      #⊗ identity w)
· identity x
  #⊗ (mon_rassociator y1 z y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x
  #⊗ ((sym_mon_braiding V y1 z #⊗ identity y2)
      #⊗ identity w) = ?b
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
cohe2: mon_lassociator x y1 y2 #⊗ identity (z ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator x (y1 ⊗ y2) (z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator (y1 ⊗ y2) z w
· identity x
  #⊗ (mon_lassociator y1 y2 z #⊗ identity w) =
mon_lassociator (x ⊗ y1) y2 (z ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ y1) #⊗ mon_rassociator y2 z w
· mon_lassociator x y1 (y2 ⊗ z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ y1, y2 ⊗ z, w}
?b =
mon_lassociator (x ⊗ y1) y2 (z ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ y1) #⊗ mon_rassociator y2 z w
· mon_lassociator x y1 (y2 ⊗ z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ y1, y2 ⊗ z, w}
· identity x
  #⊗ ((identity y1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 z)
      #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 (z ⊗ y2) w
· αinv^{ V }_{ x, y1, z ⊗ y2 ⊗ w}
· identity (x ⊗ y1) #⊗ mon_lassociator z y2 w
· mon_rassociator (x ⊗ y1) z (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator (x ⊗ y1) z (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator x y1 (z ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
· identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator y1 z (y2 ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ y1 ⊗ z, y2, w}
· identity x
  #⊗ (((pr12 V) y1 z #⊗ identity y2) #⊗ identity w)

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
cohe2: mon_lassociator x y1 y2 #⊗ identity (z ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator x (y1 ⊗ y2) (z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator (y1 ⊗ y2) z w
· identity x
  #⊗ (mon_lassociator y1 y2 z #⊗ identity w) =
mon_lassociator (x ⊗ y1) y2 (z ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ y1) #⊗ mon_rassociator y2 z w
· mon_lassociator x y1 (y2 ⊗ z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ y1, y2 ⊗ z, w}
mon_lassociator x y1 y2 #⊗ identity (z ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator x (y1 ⊗ y2) (z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator (y1 ⊗ y2) z w
· identity x
  #⊗ (mon_lassociator y1 y2 z #⊗ identity w)
· identity x
  #⊗ ((identity y1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 z)
      #⊗ identity w)
· identity x
  #⊗ (mon_rassociator y1 z y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x
  #⊗ ((sym_mon_braiding V y1 z #⊗ identity y2)
      #⊗ identity w) = ?b
 
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
cohe2: mon_lassociator x y1 y2 #⊗ identity (z ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator x (y1 ⊗ y2) (z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator (y1 ⊗ y2) z w
· identity x
  #⊗ (mon_lassociator y1 y2 z #⊗ identity w) =
mon_lassociator (x ⊗ y1) y2 (z ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ y1) #⊗ mon_rassociator y2 z w
· mon_lassociator x y1 (y2 ⊗ z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ y1, y2 ⊗ z, w}
mon_lassociator x y1 y2 #⊗ identity (z ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator x (y1 ⊗ y2) (z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator (y1 ⊗ y2) z w
· identity x
  #⊗ (mon_lassociator y1 y2 z #⊗ identity w) = ?y'

      exact cohe2. 
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
cohe2: mon_lassociator x y1 y2 #⊗ identity (z ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator x (y1 ⊗ y2) (z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator (y1 ⊗ y2) z w
· identity x
  #⊗ (mon_lassociator y1 y2 z #⊗ identity w) =
mon_lassociator (x ⊗ y1) y2 (z ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ y1) #⊗ mon_rassociator y2 z w
· mon_lassociator x y1 (y2 ⊗ z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ y1, y2 ⊗ z, w}
mon_lassociator (x ⊗ y1) y2 (z ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ y1) #⊗ mon_rassociator y2 z w
· mon_lassociator x y1 (y2 ⊗ z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ y1, y2 ⊗ z, w}
· identity x
  #⊗ ((identity y1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 z)
      #⊗ identity w)
· identity x
  #⊗ (mon_rassociator y1 z y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x
  #⊗ ((sym_mon_braiding V y1 z #⊗ identity y2)
      #⊗ identity w) =
mon_lassociator (x ⊗ y1) y2 (z ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ y1) #⊗ mon_rassociator y2 z w
· mon_lassociator x y1 (y2 ⊗ z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ y1, y2 ⊗ z, w}
· identity x
  #⊗ ((identity y1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 z)
      #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 (z ⊗ y2) w
· αinv^{ V }_{ x, y1, z ⊗ y2 ⊗ w}
· identity (x ⊗ y1) #⊗ mon_lassociator z y2 w
· mon_rassociator (x ⊗ y1) z (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator (x ⊗ y1) z (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator x y1 (z ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
· identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator y1 z (y2 ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ y1 ⊗ z, y2, w}
· identity x
  #⊗ (((pr12 V) y1 z #⊗ identity y2) #⊗ identity w)

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
cohe2: mon_lassociator x y1 y2 #⊗ identity (z ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator x (y1 ⊗ y2) (z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator (y1 ⊗ y2) z w
· identity x
  #⊗ (mon_lassociator y1 y2 z #⊗ identity w) =
mon_lassociator (x ⊗ y1) y2 (z ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ y1) #⊗ mon_rassociator y2 z w
· mon_lassociator x y1 (y2 ⊗ z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ y1, y2 ⊗ z, w}
mon_lassociator (x ⊗ y1) y2 (z ⊗ w)
· (identity (x ⊗ y1) #⊗ mon_rassociator y2 z w
   · (mon_lassociator x y1 (y2 ⊗ z ⊗ w)
      · (identity x #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ y1, y2 ⊗ z, w}
         · (identity x
            #⊗ ((identity y1
                 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 z)
                #⊗ identity w)
            · (identity x
               #⊗ (mon_rassociator y1 z y2
                   #⊗ identity w)
               · identity x
                 #⊗ ((sym_mon_braiding V y1 z
                      #⊗ identity y2) #⊗ identity w)))))) =
mon_lassociator (x ⊗ y1) y2 (z ⊗ w)
· (identity (x ⊗ y1) #⊗ mon_rassociator y2 z w
   · (mon_lassociator x y1 (y2 ⊗ z ⊗ w)
      · (identity x #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ y1, y2 ⊗ z, w}
         · (identity x
            #⊗ ((identity y1
                 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 z)
                #⊗ identity w)
            · (identity x
               #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 (z ⊗ y2) w
               · (αinv^{ V }_{ x, y1, z ⊗ y2 ⊗ w}
                  · (identity (x ⊗ y1)
                     #⊗ mon_lassociator z y2 w
                     · (mon_rassociator (x ⊗ y1) z
                          (y2 ⊗ w)
                        · (mon_lassociator (x ⊗ y1) z
                             (y2 ⊗ w)
                           · (mon_lassociator x y1
                                (z ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
                              · (identity x
                                 #⊗ mon_rassociator y1
                                      z (...)
                                 · (... #⊗ ...
                                    · ... #⊗ ...))))))))))))

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
cohe2: mon_lassociator x y1 y2 #⊗ identity (z ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator x (y1 ⊗ y2) (z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator (y1 ⊗ y2) z w
· identity x
  #⊗ (mon_lassociator y1 y2 z #⊗ identity w) =
mon_lassociator (x ⊗ y1) y2 (z ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ y1) #⊗ mon_rassociator y2 z w
· mon_lassociator x y1 (y2 ⊗ z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ y1, y2 ⊗ z, w}
identity x #⊗ (mon_rassociator y1 z y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x
  #⊗ ((sym_mon_braiding V y1 z #⊗ identity y2)
      #⊗ identity w) =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 (z ⊗ y2) w
· (αinv^{ V }_{ x, y1, z ⊗ y2 ⊗ w}
   · (identity (x ⊗ y1) #⊗ mon_lassociator z y2 w
      · (mon_rassociator (x ⊗ y1) z (y2 ⊗ w)
         · (mon_lassociator (x ⊗ y1) z (y2 ⊗ w)
            · (mon_lassociator x y1 (z ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
               · (identity x
                  #⊗ mon_rassociator y1 z (y2 ⊗ w)
                  · (identity x
                     #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ y1 ⊗ z, y2, w}
                     · identity x
                       #⊗ (((pr12 V) y1 z
                            #⊗ identity y2)
                           #⊗ identity w))))))))

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
cohe2: mon_lassociator x y1 y2 #⊗ identity (z ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator x (y1 ⊗ y2) (z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator (y1 ⊗ y2) z w
· identity x
  #⊗ (mon_lassociator y1 y2 z #⊗ identity w) =
mon_lassociator (x ⊗ y1) y2 (z ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ y1) #⊗ mon_rassociator y2 z w
· mon_lassociator x y1 (y2 ⊗ z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ y1, y2 ⊗ z, w}
identity x #⊗ (mon_rassociator y1 z y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x
  #⊗ ((sym_mon_braiding V y1 z #⊗ identity y2)
      #⊗ identity w) =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 (z ⊗ y2) w
· αinv^{ V }_{ x, y1, z ⊗ y2 ⊗ w}
· identity (x ⊗ y1) #⊗ mon_lassociator z y2 w
· mon_rassociator (x ⊗ y1) z (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator (x ⊗ y1) z (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator x y1 (z ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
· identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator y1 z (y2 ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ y1 ⊗ z, y2, w}
· identity x
  #⊗ (((pr12 V) y1 z #⊗ identity y2) #⊗ identity w)

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
cohe2: mon_lassociator x y1 y2 #⊗ identity (z ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator x (y1 ⊗ y2) (z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator (y1 ⊗ y2) z w
· identity x
  #⊗ (mon_lassociator y1 y2 z #⊗ identity w) =
mon_lassociator (x ⊗ y1) y2 (z ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ y1) #⊗ mon_rassociator y2 z w
· mon_lassociator x y1 (y2 ⊗ z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ y1, y2 ⊗ z, w}
identity x #⊗ (mon_rassociator y1 z y2 #⊗ identity w) =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 (z ⊗ y2) w
· αinv^{ V }_{ x, y1, z ⊗ y2 ⊗ w}
· identity (x ⊗ y1) #⊗ mon_lassociator z y2 w
· mon_rassociator (x ⊗ y1) z (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator (x ⊗ y1) z (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator x y1 (z ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
· identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator y1 z (y2 ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ y1 ⊗ z, y2, w}

    (** the goal is an instance of coherence for monoidal categories *)
    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
cohe2: mon_lassociator x y1 y2 #⊗ identity (z ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator x (y1 ⊗ y2) (z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator (y1 ⊗ y2) z w
· identity x
  #⊗ (mon_lassociator y1 y2 z #⊗ identity w) =
mon_lassociator (x ⊗ y1) y2 (z ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ y1) #⊗ mon_rassociator y2 z w
· mon_lassociator x y1 (y2 ⊗ z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ y1, y2 ⊗ z, w}
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 (z ⊗ y2) w
· αinv^{ V }_{ x, y1, z ⊗ y2 ⊗ w}
· identity (x ⊗ y1) #⊗ mon_lassociator z y2 w
· mon_rassociator (x ⊗ y1) z (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator (x ⊗ y1) z (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator x y1 (z ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
· identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator y1 z (y2 ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ y1 ⊗ z, y2, w} =
identity x #⊗ (mon_rassociator y1 z y2 #⊗ identity w)

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
cohe2: mon_lassociator x y1 y2 #⊗ identity (z ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator x (y1 ⊗ y2) (z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator (y1 ⊗ y2) z w
· identity x
  #⊗ (mon_lassociator y1 y2 z #⊗ identity w) =
mon_lassociator (x ⊗ y1) y2 (z ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ y1) #⊗ mon_rassociator y2 z w
· mon_lassociator x y1 (y2 ⊗ z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ y1, y2 ⊗ z, w}
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 (z ⊗ y2) w
· αinv^{ V }_{ x, y1, z ⊗ y2 ⊗ w}
· identity (x ⊗ y1) #⊗ mon_lassociator z y2 w
· mon_rassociator (x ⊗ y1) z (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator (x ⊗ y1) z (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator x y1 (z ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
· identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator y1 z (y2 ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ y1 ⊗ z, y2, w} = ?b
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
cohe2: mon_lassociator x y1 y2 #⊗ identity (z ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator x (y1 ⊗ y2) (z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator (y1 ⊗ y2) z w
· identity x
  #⊗ (mon_lassociator y1 y2 z #⊗ identity w) =
mon_lassociator (x ⊗ y1) y2 (z ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ y1) #⊗ mon_rassociator y2 z w
· mon_lassociator x y1 (y2 ⊗ z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ y1, y2 ⊗ z, w}
?b =
identity x #⊗ (mon_rassociator y1 z y2 #⊗ identity w)

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
cohe2: mon_lassociator x y1 y2 #⊗ identity (z ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator x (y1 ⊗ y2) (z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator (y1 ⊗ y2) z w
· identity x
  #⊗ (mon_lassociator y1 y2 z #⊗ identity w) =
mon_lassociator (x ⊗ y1) y2 (z ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ y1) #⊗ mon_rassociator y2 z w
· mon_lassociator x y1 (y2 ⊗ z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ y1, y2 ⊗ z, w}
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 (z ⊗ y2) w
· αinv^{ V }_{ x, y1, z ⊗ y2 ⊗ w}
· identity (x ⊗ y1) #⊗ mon_lassociator z y2 w
· mon_rassociator (x ⊗ y1) z (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator (x ⊗ y1) z (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator x y1 (z ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
· identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator y1 z (y2 ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ y1 ⊗ z, y2, w} = ?b

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
cohe2: mon_lassociator x y1 y2 #⊗ identity (z ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator x (y1 ⊗ y2) (z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator (y1 ⊗ y2) z w
· identity x
  #⊗ (mon_lassociator y1 y2 z #⊗ identity w) =
mon_lassociator (x ⊗ y1) y2 (z ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ y1) #⊗ mon_rassociator y2 z w
· mon_lassociator x y1 (y2 ⊗ z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ y1, y2 ⊗ z, w}
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 (z ⊗ y2) w
· (αinv^{ V }_{ x, y1, z ⊗ y2 ⊗ w}
   · (identity (x ⊗ y1) #⊗ mon_lassociator z y2 w
      · (mon_rassociator (x ⊗ y1) z (y2 ⊗ w)
         · (mon_lassociator (x ⊗ y1) z (y2 ⊗ w)
            · (mon_lassociator x y1 (z ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
               · (identity x
                  #⊗ mon_rassociator y1 z (y2 ⊗ w)
                  · identity x
                    #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ y1 ⊗ z, y2, w})))))) =
?b

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
cohe2: mon_lassociator x y1 y2 #⊗ identity (z ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator x (y1 ⊗ y2) (z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator (y1 ⊗ y2) z w
· identity x
  #⊗ (mon_lassociator y1 y2 z #⊗ identity w) =
mon_lassociator (x ⊗ y1) y2 (z ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ y1) #⊗ mon_rassociator y2 z w
· mon_lassociator x y1 (y2 ⊗ z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ y1, y2 ⊗ z, w}
mon_rassociator (x ⊗ y1) z (y2 ⊗ w)
· (mon_lassociator (x ⊗ y1) z (y2 ⊗ w)
   · (mon_lassociator x y1 (z ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
      · (identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator y1 z (y2 ⊗ w)
         · identity x #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ y1 ⊗ z, y2, w}))) =
?t2

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
cohe2: mon_lassociator x y1 y2 #⊗ identity (z ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator x (y1 ⊗ y2) (z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator (y1 ⊗ y2) z w
· identity x
  #⊗ (mon_lassociator y1 y2 z #⊗ identity w) =
mon_lassociator (x ⊗ y1) y2 (z ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ y1) #⊗ mon_rassociator y2 z w
· mon_lassociator x y1 (y2 ⊗ z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ y1, y2 ⊗ z, w}
mon_rassociator (x ⊗ y1) z (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator (x ⊗ y1) z (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator x y1 (z ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
· identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator y1 z (y2 ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ y1 ⊗ z, y2, w} = ?t2

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
cohe2: mon_lassociator x y1 y2 #⊗ identity (z ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator x (y1 ⊗ y2) (z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator (y1 ⊗ y2) z w
· identity x
  #⊗ (mon_lassociator y1 y2 z #⊗ identity w) =
mon_lassociator (x ⊗ y1) y2 (z ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ y1) #⊗ mon_rassociator y2 z w
· mon_lassociator x y1 (y2 ⊗ z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ y1, y2 ⊗ z, w}
identity (x ⊗ y1 ⊗ (z ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w)))
· mon_lassociator x y1 (z ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
· identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator y1 z (y2 ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ y1 ⊗ z, y2, w} = ?t2

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
cohe2: mon_lassociator x y1 y2 #⊗ identity (z ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator x (y1 ⊗ y2) (z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator (y1 ⊗ y2) z w
· identity x
  #⊗ (mon_lassociator y1 y2 z #⊗ identity w) =
mon_lassociator (x ⊗ y1) y2 (z ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ y1) #⊗ mon_rassociator y2 z w
· mon_lassociator x y1 (y2 ⊗ z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ y1, y2 ⊗ z, w}
mon_lassociator x y1 (z ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
· identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator y1 z (y2 ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ y1 ⊗ z, y2, w} = ?t2

      apply idpath.
    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
cohe2: mon_lassociator x y1 y2 #⊗ identity (z ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator x (y1 ⊗ y2) (z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator (y1 ⊗ y2) z w
· identity x
  #⊗ (mon_lassociator y1 y2 z #⊗ identity w) =
mon_lassociator (x ⊗ y1) y2 (z ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ y1) #⊗ mon_rassociator y2 z w
· mon_lassociator x y1 (y2 ⊗ z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ y1, y2 ⊗ z, w}
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 (z ⊗ y2) w
· (αinv^{ V }_{ x, y1, z ⊗ y2 ⊗ w}
   · (identity (x ⊗ y1) #⊗ mon_lassociator z y2 w
      · (mon_lassociator x y1 (z ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
         · identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator y1 z (y2 ⊗ w)
         · identity x #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ y1 ⊗ z, y2, w}))) =
identity x #⊗ (mon_rassociator y1 z y2 #⊗ identity w)

#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)

· mon_lassociator x (y1 ⊗ y2) (z ⊗ w)

   · (identity (x ⊗ y1) #⊗ mon_lassociator z y2 w
      · (mon_lassociator x y1 (z ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
         · identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator y1 z (y2 ⊗ w)
         · identity x #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ y1 ⊗ z, y2, w}))) =

V: sym_monoidal_cat

cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)

   · identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator y1 z (y2 ⊗ w)

V: sym_monoidal_cat

#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =

· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))

· mon_lassociator x (y1 ⊗ y2) (z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator (y1 ⊗ y2) z w
· identity x
  #⊗ (mon_lassociator y1 y2 z #⊗ identity w) =

· identity x #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ y1, y2 ⊗ z, w}

· mon_lassociator x y1 (z ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
· identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator y1 z (y2 ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ y1 ⊗ z, y2, w} = ?t2

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
cohe2: mon_lassociator x y1 y2 #⊗ identity (z ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator x (y1 ⊗ y2) (z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator (y1 ⊗ y2) z w
· identity x
  #⊗ (mon_lassociator y1 y2 z #⊗ identity w) =
mon_lassociator (x ⊗ y1) y2 (z ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ y1) #⊗ mon_rassociator y2 z w
· mon_lassociator x y1 (y2 ⊗ z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ y1, y2 ⊗ z, w}
(identity x #⊗ identity y1) #⊗ mon_lassociator z y2 w
· mon_lassociator x y1 (z ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
· identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator y1 z (y2 ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ y1 ⊗ z, y2, w} = ?t2

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
cohe2: mon_lassociator x y1 y2 #⊗ identity (z ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator x (y1 ⊗ y2) (z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator (y1 ⊗ y2) z w
· identity x
  #⊗ (mon_lassociator y1 y2 z #⊗ identity w) =
mon_lassociator (x ⊗ y1) y2 (z ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ y1) #⊗ mon_rassociator y2 z w
· mon_lassociator x y1 (y2 ⊗ z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ y1, y2 ⊗ z, w}
mon_lassociator x y1 (z ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity x
  #⊗ (identity y1 #⊗ mon_lassociator z y2 w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator y1 z (y2 ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ y1 ⊗ z, y2, w} = ?t2

      apply idpath.
    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
cohe2: mon_lassociator x y1 y2 #⊗ identity (z ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator x (y1 ⊗ y2) (z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator (y1 ⊗ y2) z w
· identity x
  #⊗ (mon_lassociator y1 y2 z #⊗ identity w) =
mon_lassociator (x ⊗ y1) y2 (z ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ y1) #⊗ mon_rassociator y2 z w
· mon_lassociator x y1 (y2 ⊗ z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ y1, y2 ⊗ z, w}
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 (z ⊗ y2) w
· (αinv^{ V }_{ x, y1, z ⊗ y2 ⊗ w}
   · (mon_lassociator x y1 (z ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
      · identity x
        #⊗ (identity y1 #⊗ mon_lassociator z y2 w)
      · identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator y1 z (y2 ⊗ w)
      · identity x #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ y1 ⊗ z, y2, w})) =
identity x #⊗ (mon_rassociator y1 z y2 #⊗ identity w)

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
cohe2: mon_lassociator x y1 y2 #⊗ identity (z ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator x (y1 ⊗ y2) (z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator (y1 ⊗ y2) z w
· identity x
  #⊗ (mon_lassociator y1 y2 z #⊗ identity w) =

· identity (x ⊗ y1) #⊗ mon_rassociator y2 z w
· mon_lassociator x y1 (y2 ⊗ z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ y1, y2 ⊗ z, w}
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 (z ⊗ y2) w
· (αinv^{ V }_{ x, y1, z ⊗ y2 ⊗ w}
   · (mon_lassociator x y1 (z ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
      · identity x
        #⊗ (identity y1 #⊗ mon_lassociator z y2 w)
      · identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator y1 z (y2 ⊗ w)
      · identity x #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ y1 ⊗ z, y2, w})) =
?b
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
cohe2: mon_lassociator x y1 y2 #⊗ identity (z ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator x (y1 ⊗ y2) (z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator (y1 ⊗ y2) z w
· identity x
  #⊗ (mon_lassociator y1 y2 z #⊗ identity w) =
mon_lassociator (x ⊗ y1) y2 (z ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ y1) #⊗ mon_rassociator y2 z w
· mon_lassociator x y1 (y2 ⊗ z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ y1, y2 ⊗ z, w}
?b =
identity x #⊗ (mon_rassociator y1 z y2 #⊗ identity w)

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator (z ⊗ y1) y2 w
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ w))
cohe2: mon_lassociator x y1 y2 #⊗ identity (z ⊗ w)
· mon_lassociator x (y1 ⊗ y2) (z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator (y1 ⊗ y2) z w
· identity x
  #⊗ (mon_lassociator y1 y2 z #⊗ identity w) =
mon_lassociator (x ⊗ y1) y2 (z ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ y1) #⊗ mon_rassociator y2 z w
· mon_lassociator x y1 (y2 ⊗ z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ y1, y2 ⊗ z, w}
identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 (z ⊗ y2) w
· (αinv^{ V }_{ x, y1, z ⊗ y2 ⊗ w}
   · (mon_lassociator x y1 (z ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
      · identity x
        #⊗ (identity y1 #⊗ mon_lassociator z y2 w)
      · identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator y1 z (y2 ⊗ w)
      · identity x #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ y1 ⊗ z, y2, w})) =
?b

#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =

· identity (x ⊗ y1) #⊗ mon_rassociator y2 z w
· mon_lassociator x y1 (y2 ⊗ z ⊗ w)
· identity x #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ y1, y2 ⊗ z, w}

· (mon_lassociator x y1 (z ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
   · identity x
     #⊗ (identity y1 #⊗ mon_lassociator z y2 w)
   · identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator y1 z (y2 ⊗ w)
   · identity x #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ y1 ⊗ z, y2, w}) = 
?t2

x, y1, y2, z, w: V
cohe1: identity x
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z y1 y2 #⊗ identity w)
· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z (y1 ⊗ y2) w
· mon_rassociator x z (y1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ w)
· identity (x ⊗ z) #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 y2 w =

· identity x #⊗ mon_lassociator z y1 (y2 ⊗ w)

· mon_lassociator x (y1 ⊗ y2) (z ⊗ w)

· identity x

· identity (x ⊗ y1) #⊗ mon_rassociator y2 z w

· identity x #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ y1, y2 ⊗ z, w}

   · identity x
     #⊗ (identity y1 #⊗ mon_lassociator z y2 w)
   · identity x #⊗ mon_rassociator y1 z (y2 ⊗ w)
   · identity x #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ y1 ⊗ z, y2, w}) =
identity x #⊗ (mon_rassociator y1 z y2 #⊗ identity w)

V: sym_monoidal_cat
