V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
auxH: (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2)
· identity (x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2))
  #⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2 =
identity (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2))
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
  #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
(identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗_{ V} z2) = ?t2

        
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
auxH: (x1 ⊗^{ V}_{l} sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2)
· (x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2))
  ⊗^{ V}_{l} mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2 =
(x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2))
⊗^{ V}_{l} mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (x1 ⊗^{ V}_{l} sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
  #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
(identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗_{ V} z2) = ?t2

        
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
auxH: (x1 ⊗^{ V}_{l} sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2)
· (x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2))
  ⊗^{ V}_{l} mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2 =
(x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2))
⊗^{ V}_{l} mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (x1 ⊗^{ V}_{l} sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
  #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
z_iso ((x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2)) ⊗_{ V} (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2))
  ((x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2)) ⊗_{ V} (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)))
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
auxH: (x1 ⊗^{ V}_{l} sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2)
· (x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2))
  ⊗^{ V}_{l} mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2 =
(x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2))
⊗^{ V}_{l} mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (x1 ⊗^{ V}_{l} sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
  #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
auxiso:= ?Goal1: z_iso
  ((x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2)) ⊗_{ V} (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2))
  ((x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2)) ⊗_{ V} (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)))
(identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗_{ V} z2) = 
?t2

        
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
auxH: (x1 ⊗^{ V}_{l} sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2)
· (x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2))
  ⊗^{ V}_{l} mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2 =
(x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2))
⊗^{ V}_{l} mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (x1 ⊗^{ V}_{l} sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
  #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
z_iso ((x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2)) ⊗_{ V} (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2))
  ((x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2)) ⊗_{ V} (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)))
 
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
auxH: (x1 ⊗^{ V}_{l} sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2)
· (x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2))
  ⊗^{ V}_{l} mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2 =
(x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2))
⊗^{ V}_{l} mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (x1 ⊗^{ V}_{l} sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
  #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
z_iso (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))

          exact (z_iso_from_associator_iso V _ _ _). 
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
auxH: (x1 ⊗^{ V}_{l} sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2)
· (x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2))
  ⊗^{ V}_{l} mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2 =
(x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2))
⊗^{ V}_{l} mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (x1 ⊗^{ V}_{l} sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
  #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
auxiso:= functor_on_z_iso
  (leftwhiskering_functor V (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2)))
  (z_iso_from_associator_iso V z1 y1 z2): z_iso
  ((x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2)) ⊗_{ V} (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2))
  ((x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2)) ⊗_{ V} (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)))
(identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗_{ V} z2) = ?t2

        
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
auxiso:= functor_on_z_iso
  (leftwhiskering_functor V (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2)))
  (z_iso_from_associator_iso V z1 y1 z2): z_iso
  ((x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2)) ⊗_{ V} (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2))
  ((x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2)) ⊗_{ V} (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)))
auxH: inv_from_z_iso auxiso
· ((x1 ⊗^{ V}_{l} sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
   #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2)
   · (x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2))
     ⊗^{ V}_{l} mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2) =
(x1 ⊗^{ V}_{l} sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
(identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗_{ V} z2) = ?t2

        
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
auxiso:= functor_on_z_iso
  (leftwhiskering_functor V (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2)))
  (z_iso_from_associator_iso V z1 y1 z2): z_iso
  ((x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2)) ⊗_{ V} (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2))
  ((x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2)) ⊗_{ V} (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)))
auxH: (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2))
⊗^{ V}_{l} αinv^{ V }_{ z1, y1, z2}
· ((x1 ⊗^{ V}_{l} (pr12 V) x2 y2)
   #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2)
   · (x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2))
     ⊗^{ V}_{l} mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2) =
(x1 ⊗^{ V}_{l} (pr12 V) x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
(identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗_{ V} z2) = ?t2

        
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
auxH: (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2))
⊗^{ V}_{l} αinv^{ V }_{ z1, y1, z2}
· ((x1 ⊗^{ V}_{l} (pr12 V) x2 y2)
   #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2)
   · (x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2))
     ⊗^{ V}_{l} mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2) =
(x1 ⊗^{ V}_{l} (pr12 V) x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
(identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗_{ V} z2) = ?t2

        
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
auxH: identity (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2))
#⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ z1, y1, z2}
· ((identity x1 #⊗ (pr12 V) x2 y2)
   #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2)
   · identity (x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2))
     #⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2) =
(identity x1 #⊗ (pr12 V) x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
(identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗_{ V} z2) = ?t2

        apply (!auxH).
      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symyx
· (αinv^{ V }_{ x1, x2, y2} #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2)
   · (mon_rassociator (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2) (z1 ⊗ y1) z2
      · (mon_rassociator (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2) z1 y1
         #⊗ identity z2
         · (α^{ V }_{ x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2 ⊗ z1, y1, z2}
            · ((mon_lassociator x1 x2 y2
                #⊗ identity z1)
               #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
               · (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2)) z1
                    (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
                  · (identity (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2))
                     #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ z1, y1, z2}
                     · ((identity x1 #⊗ (pr12 V) x2 y2)
                        #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2)
                        · identity (x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2))
                          #⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2))
                  · mon_rassociator (x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2))
                      z1 (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
                  · (mon_lassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ x2) z1
                     #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
                     · ((identity x1
                         #⊗ mon_lassociator y2 x2 z1)
                        #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
                        · αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y2,
                          x2 ⊗ z1}
                          #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2))))
               · mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) (x2 ⊗ z1)
                   (y1 ⊗ z2)))))) = middle

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symyx
· (αinv^{ V }_{ x1, x2, y2} #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2)
   · (mon_rassociator (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2) (z1 ⊗ y1) z2
      · (mon_rassociator (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2) z1 y1
         #⊗ identity z2
         · (α^{ V }_{ x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2 ⊗ z1, y1, z2}
            · ((mon_lassociator x1 x2 y2
                #⊗ identity z1)
               #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
               · (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2)) z1
                    (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
                  · (identity (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2))
                     #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ z1, y1, z2}
                     · ((identity x1
                         #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
                        #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2)
                        · identity (x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2))
                          #⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2))
                  · mon_rassociator (x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2))
                      z1 (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
                  · (mon_lassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ x2) z1
                     #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
                     · ((identity x1
                         #⊗ mon_lassociator y2 x2 z1)
                        #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
                        · αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y2,
                          x2 ⊗ z1}
                          #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2))))
               · mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) (x2 ⊗ z1)
                   (y1 ⊗ z2)))))) = middle

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symyx
· αinv^{ V }_{ x1, x2, y2} #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2)
· mon_rassociator (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2) (z1 ⊗ y1) z2
· mon_rassociator (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2) z1 y1 #⊗ identity z2
· α^{ V }_{ x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2 ⊗ z1, y1, z2}
· (mon_lassociator x1 x2 y2 #⊗ identity z1)
  #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2)) z1 (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· identity (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2))
  #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ z1, y1, z2}
· (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
  #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2)
· identity (x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2))
  #⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· mon_rassociator (x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2)) z1 (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· mon_lassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ x2) z1
  #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· (identity x1 #⊗ mon_lassociator y2 x2 z1)
  #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y2, x2 ⊗ z1}
  #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) (x2 ⊗ z1) (y1 ⊗ z2) =
middle

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symyx
· αinv^{ V }_{ x1, x2, y2} #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2)
· mon_rassociator (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2) (z1 ⊗ y1) z2
· mon_rassociator (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2) z1 y1 #⊗ identity z2
· α^{ V }_{ x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2 ⊗ z1, y1, z2}
· (mon_lassociator x1 x2 y2 #⊗ identity z1)
  #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2)) z1 (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· identity (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2))
  #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ z1, y1, z2} · symxy
· identity (x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2))
  #⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· mon_rassociator (x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2)) z1 (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· mon_lassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ x2) z1
  #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· (identity x1 #⊗ mon_lassociator y2 x2 z1)
  #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y2, x2 ⊗ z1}
  #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) (x2 ⊗ z1) (y1 ⊗ z2) =
middle

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symyx
· αinv^{ V }_{ x1, x2, y2} #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2)
· mon_rassociator (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2) (z1 ⊗ y1) z2
· mon_rassociator (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2) z1 y1 #⊗ identity z2
· α^{ V }_{ x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2 ⊗ z1, y1, z2}
· (mon_lassociator x1 x2 y2 #⊗ identity z1)
  #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2)) z1 (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· identity (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2))
  #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ z1, y1, z2} · symxy
· identity (x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2))
  #⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· mon_rassociator (x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2)) z1 (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· mon_lassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ x2) z1
  #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· (identity x1 #⊗ mon_lassociator y2 x2 z1)
  #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y2, x2 ⊗ z1}
  #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) (x2 ⊗ z1) (y1 ⊗ z2) = 
?b
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
?b = middle

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symyx
· αinv^{ V }_{ x1, x2, y2} #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2)
· mon_rassociator (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2) (z1 ⊗ y1) z2
· mon_rassociator (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2) z1 y1 #⊗ identity z2
· α^{ V }_{ x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2 ⊗ z1, y1, z2}
· (mon_lassociator x1 x2 y2 #⊗ identity z1)
  #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2)) z1 (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· identity (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2))
  #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ z1, y1, z2} · symxy
· identity (x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2))
  #⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· mon_rassociator (x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2)) z1 (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· mon_lassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ x2) z1
  #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· (identity x1 #⊗ mon_lassociator y2 x2 z1)
  #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y2, x2 ⊗ z1}
  #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) (x2 ⊗ z1) (y1 ⊗ z2) = 
?b
 
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symyx
· αinv^{ V }_{ x1, x2, y2} #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2)
· mon_rassociator (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2) (z1 ⊗ y1) z2
· mon_rassociator (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2) z1 y1 #⊗ identity z2
· α^{ V }_{ x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2 ⊗ z1, y1, z2}
· (mon_lassociator x1 x2 y2 #⊗ identity z1)
  #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2)) z1 (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· identity (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2))
  #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ z1, y1, z2} = ?y'

        
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symyx
· (αinv^{ V }_{ x1, x2, y2} #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2)
   · (mon_rassociator (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2) (z1 ⊗ y1) z2
      · (mon_rassociator (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2) z1 y1
         #⊗ identity z2
         · (α^{ V }_{ x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2 ⊗ z1, y1, z2}
            · ((mon_lassociator x1 x2 y2
                #⊗ identity z1)
               #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
               · (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2)) z1
                    (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
                  · identity (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2))
                    #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ z1, y1, z2})))))) =
?y'

        
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
αinv^{ V }_{ x1, x2, y2} #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2)
· (mon_rassociator (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2) (z1 ⊗ y1) z2
   · (mon_rassociator (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2) z1 y1
      #⊗ identity z2
      · (α^{ V }_{ x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2 ⊗ z1, y1, z2}
         · ((mon_lassociator x1 x2 y2 #⊗ identity z1)
            #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
            · (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2)) z1
                 (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
               · identity (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2))
                 #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ z1, y1, z2}))))) =
?t2

        (* show_id_type. *)
        
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
αinv^{ V }_{ x1, x2, y2} #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2)
· (mon_rassociator (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2) (z1 ⊗ y1) z2
   · (mon_rassociator (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2) z1 y1
      #⊗ identity z2
      · (α^{ V }_{ x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2 ⊗ z1, y1, z2}
         · ((mon_lassociator x1 x2 y2 #⊗ identity z1)
            #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
            · (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2)) z1
                 (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
               · identity (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2))
                 #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ z1, y1, z2}))))) =
identity (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2))
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
identity (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2)) = ?t2

        
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
αinv^{ V }_{ x1, x2, y2} #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2)
· (mon_rassociator (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2) (z1 ⊗ y1) z2
   · (mon_rassociator (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2) z1 y1
      #⊗ identity z2
      · (α^{ V }_{ x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2 ⊗ z1, y1, z2}
         · ((mon_lassociator x1 x2 y2 #⊗ identity z1)
            #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
            · (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2)) z1
                 (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
               · identity (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2))
                 #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ z1, y1, z2}))))) =
identity (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2))

          
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
αinv^{ V }_{ x1, x2, y2} #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2)
· (mon_rassociator (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2) (z1 ⊗ y1) z2
   · (mon_rassociator (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2) z1 y1
      #⊗ identity z2
      · (α^{ V }_{ x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2 ⊗ z1, y1, z2}
         · ((mon_lassociator x1 x2 y2 #⊗ identity z1)
            #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
            · (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2)) z1
                 (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
               · identity (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2))
                 #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ z1, y1, z2}))))) = 
?b
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
?b = identity (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2))

          
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
αinv^{ V }_{ x1, x2, y2} #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2)
· (mon_rassociator (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2) (z1 ⊗ y1) z2
   · (mon_rassociator (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2) z1 y1
      #⊗ identity z2
      · (α^{ V }_{ x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2 ⊗ z1, y1, z2}
         · ((mon_lassociator x1 x2 y2 #⊗ identity z1)
            #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
            · (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2)) z1
                 (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
               · identity (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2))
                 #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ z1, y1, z2}))))) = 
?b

            
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
α^{ V }_{ x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2 ⊗ z1, y1, z2}
· ((mon_lassociator x1 x2 y2 #⊗ identity z1)
   #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
   · (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2)) z1
        (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
      · identity (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2))
        #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ z1, y1, z2})) = ?t20

            
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
α^{ V }_{ x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2 ⊗ z1, y1, z2}
· (mon_lassociator x1 x2 y2 #⊗ identity z1)
  #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2)) z1 (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· identity (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2))
  #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ z1, y1, z2} = ?t20

            
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
α^{ V }_{ x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2 ⊗ z1, y1, z2}
· (mon_lassociator x1 x2 y2 #⊗ identity z1)
  #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2)) z1 (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2) =
?y'

            
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
α^{ V }_{ x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2 ⊗ z1, y1, z2}
· ((mon_lassociator x1 x2 y2 #⊗ identity z1)
   #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
   · mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2)) z1
       (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)) = ?y'

            
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
α^{ V }_{ x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2 ⊗ z1, y1, z2}
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2) z1 (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
   · mon_lassociator x1 x2 y2
     #⊗ (identity z1 #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2))) =
?y'

            
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
α^{ V }_{ x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2 ⊗ z1, y1, z2}
· mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2) z1 (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· mon_lassociator x1 x2 y2
  #⊗ (identity z1 #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)) = ?y'

            
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
α^{ V }_{ x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2 ⊗ z1, y1, z2}
· mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2) z1 (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2) =
?y'

            apply mon_lassociator_lassociator.
          
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
αinv^{ V }_{ x1, x2, y2} #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2)
· (mon_rassociator (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2) (z1 ⊗ y1) z2
   · (mon_rassociator (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2) z1 y1
      #⊗ identity z2
      · (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2) z1 y1
         #⊗ identity z2
         · mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2) (z1 ⊗ y1) z2
         · identity (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2)
           #⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
         · mon_lassociator x1 x2 y2
           #⊗ (identity z1 #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2))
         · identity (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2))
           #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ z1, y1, z2}))) =
identity (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2))

          
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
αinv^{ V }_{ x1, x2, y2} #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2)
· (mon_rassociator (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2) (z1 ⊗ y1) z2
   · (mon_rassociator (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2) z1 y1
      #⊗ identity z2
      · (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2) z1 y1
         #⊗ identity z2
         · mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2) (z1 ⊗ y1) z2
         · identity (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2)
           #⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
         · mon_lassociator x1 x2 y2
           #⊗ (identity z1 #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2))
         · identity (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2))
           #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ z1, y1, z2}))) = ?b
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
?b = identity (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2))

          
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
αinv^{ V }_{ x1, x2, y2} #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2)
· (mon_rassociator (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2) (z1 ⊗ y1) z2
   · (mon_rassociator (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2) z1 y1
      #⊗ identity z2
      · (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2) z1 y1
         #⊗ identity z2
         · mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2) (z1 ⊗ y1) z2
         · identity (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2)
           #⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
         · mon_lassociator x1 x2 y2
           #⊗ (identity z1 #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2))
         · identity (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2))
           #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ z1, y1, z2}))) = ?b

            
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
mon_rassociator (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2) z1 y1 #⊗ identity z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2) z1 y1 #⊗ identity z2
   · mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2) (z1 ⊗ y1) z2
   · identity (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
   · mon_lassociator x1 x2 y2
     #⊗ (identity z1 #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2))
     #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ z1, y1, z2}) = ?t20

            
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
mon_rassociator (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2) z1 y1 #⊗ identity z2
· mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2) z1 y1 #⊗ identity z2
· mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2) (z1 ⊗ y1) z2
· identity (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2) #⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· mon_lassociator x1 x2 y2
  #⊗ (identity z1 #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2))
· identity (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2))
  #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ z1, y1, z2} = ?t20

            
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
(mon_rassociator (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2) z1 y1
 · mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2) z1 y1)
#⊗ identity z2
· mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2) (z1 ⊗ y1) z2
· identity (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2) #⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· mon_lassociator x1 x2 y2
  #⊗ (identity z1 #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2))
· identity (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2))
  #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ z1, y1, z2} = ?t20

            
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
identity (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1)) #⊗ identity z2
· mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2) (z1 ⊗ y1) z2
· identity (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2) #⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· mon_lassociator x1 x2 y2
  #⊗ (identity z1 #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2))
· identity (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2))
  #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ z1, y1, z2} = ?t20

            
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
identity (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1) ⊗ z2)
· mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2) (z1 ⊗ y1) z2
· identity (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2) #⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· mon_lassociator x1 x2 y2
  #⊗ (identity z1 #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2))
· identity (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2))
  #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ z1, y1, z2} = ?t20

            
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2) (z1 ⊗ y1) z2
· identity (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2) #⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· mon_lassociator x1 x2 y2
  #⊗ (identity z1 #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2))
· identity (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2))
  #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ z1, y1, z2} = ?t20

            apply idpath.
          
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
αinv^{ V }_{ x1, x2, y2} #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2)
· (mon_rassociator (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2) (z1 ⊗ y1) z2
   · (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2) (z1 ⊗ y1) z2
      · identity (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2)
        #⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
      · mon_lassociator x1 x2 y2
        #⊗ (identity z1 #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2))
      · identity (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2))
        #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ z1, y1, z2})) =
identity (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2))

          
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
αinv^{ V }_{ x1, x2, y2} #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2)
· (mon_rassociator (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2) (z1 ⊗ y1) z2
   · (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2) (z1 ⊗ y1) z2
      · identity (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2)
        #⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
      · mon_lassociator x1 x2 y2
        #⊗ (identity z1 #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2))
      · identity (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2))
        #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ z1, y1, z2})) = ?b
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
?b = identity (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2))

          
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
αinv^{ V }_{ x1, x2, y2} #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2)
· (mon_rassociator (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2) (z1 ⊗ y1) z2
   · (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2) (z1 ⊗ y1) z2
      · identity (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2)
        #⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
      · mon_lassociator x1 x2 y2
        #⊗ (identity z1 #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2))
      · identity (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2))
        #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ z1, y1, z2})) = ?b

            
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
mon_rassociator (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2) (z1 ⊗ y1) z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2) (z1 ⊗ y1) z2
   · identity (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
   · mon_lassociator x1 x2 y2
     #⊗ (identity z1 #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2))
     #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ z1, y1, z2}) = ?t20

            
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
mon_rassociator (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2) (z1 ⊗ y1) z2
· mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2) (z1 ⊗ y1) z2
· identity (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2) #⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· mon_lassociator x1 x2 y2
  #⊗ (identity z1 #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2))
· identity (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2))
  #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ z1, y1, z2} = ?t20

            
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
identity (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2))
· identity (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2) #⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· mon_lassociator x1 x2 y2
  #⊗ (identity z1 #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2))
· identity (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2))
  #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ z1, y1, z2} = ?t20

            
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
identity (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2) #⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· mon_lassociator x1 x2 y2
  #⊗ (identity z1 #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2))
· identity (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2))
  #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ z1, y1, z2} = ?t20

            apply idpath.
          
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
αinv^{ V }_{ x1, x2, y2} #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2)
· (identity (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2) #⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
   · mon_lassociator x1 x2 y2
     #⊗ (identity z1 #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2))
     #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ z1, y1, z2}) =
identity (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2))

          
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
αinv^{ V }_{ x1, x2, y2} #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2)
· (identity (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2) #⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
   · mon_lassociator x1 x2 y2
     #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
   · identity (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2))
     #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ z1, y1, z2}) =
identity (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2))

          
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
αinv^{ V }_{ x1, x2, y2} #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2)
· ((identity (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ y2) · mon_lassociator x1 x2 y2)
   #⊗ (mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
       · identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗_{ V} z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2))
     #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ z1, y1, z2}) =
identity (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2))

          
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
αinv^{ V }_{ x1, x2, y2} #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2)
· (mon_lassociator x1 x2 y2
   #⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
   · identity (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2))
     #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ z1, y1, z2}) =
identity (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2))

          
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
αinv^{ V }_{ x1, x2, y2} #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2)
· (mon_lassociator x1 x2 y2
   #⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
   · identity (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2))
     #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ z1, y1, z2}) = ?b
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
?b = identity (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2))

          
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
αinv^{ V }_{ x1, x2, y2} #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2)
· (mon_lassociator x1 x2 y2
   #⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
   · identity (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2))
     #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ z1, y1, z2}) = ?b

            
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
mon_lassociator x1 x2 y2 #⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· identity (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2))
  #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ z1, y1, z2} = ?t20

            
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
?t20 =
mon_lassociator x1 x2 y2 #⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· identity (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2))
  #⊗ αinv^{ V }_{ z1, y1, z2}

            apply tensor_comp_mor.
          
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
αinv^{ V }_{ x1, x2, y2} #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2)
· (mon_lassociator x1 x2 y2
   · identity (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2)))
  #⊗ (mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
      · αinv^{ V }_{ z1, y1, z2}) =
identity (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2))

          
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
(αinv^{ V }_{ x1, x2, y2}
 · (mon_lassociator x1 x2 y2
    · identity (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2))))
#⊗ (identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2)
    · (mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
       · αinv^{ V }_{ z1, y1, z2})) =
identity (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2))

          
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
(αinv^{ V }_{ x1, x2, y2} · mon_lassociator x1 x2 y2)
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
    · αinv^{ V }_{ z1, y1, z2}) =
identity (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2))

          
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
(αinv^{ V }_{ x1, x2, y2} · mon_lassociator x1 x2 y2)
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
    · αinv^{ V }_{ z1, y1, z2}) = ?b
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
?b = identity (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2))

          
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
(αinv^{ V }_{ x1, x2, y2} · mon_lassociator x1 x2 y2)
#⊗ (mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
    · αinv^{ V }_{ z1, y1, z2}) = ?b

            
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2 · αinv^{ V }_{ z1, y1, z2} =
?t20

            apply mon_lassociator_rassociator.
          
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
(αinv^{ V }_{ x1, x2, y2} · mon_lassociator x1 x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) =
identity (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2))

          
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
(αinv^{ V }_{ x1, x2, y2} · mon_lassociator x1 x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) =
identity (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2)) #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2)

          
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
αinv^{ V }_{ x1, x2, y2} · mon_lassociator x1 x2 y2 =
identity (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2))

          apply mon_rassociator_lassociator.
        
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
identity (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2)) = ?t2
 apply idpath.
      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symyx · identity (x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2))
· symxy
· identity (x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2))
  #⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· mon_rassociator (x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2)) z1 (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· mon_lassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ x2) z1
  #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· (identity x1 #⊗ mon_lassociator y2 x2 z1)
  #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y2, x2 ⊗ z1}
  #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) (x2 ⊗ z1) (y1 ⊗ z2) =
middle

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symyx · symxy
· identity (x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2))
  #⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· mon_rassociator (x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2)) z1 (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· mon_lassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ x2) z1
  #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· (identity x1 #⊗ mon_lassociator y2 x2 z1)
  #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y2, x2 ⊗ z1}
  #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) (x2 ⊗ z1) (y1 ⊗ z2) =
middle

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symyx · symxy
· identity (x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2))
  #⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· mon_rassociator (x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2)) z1 (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· mon_lassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ x2) z1
  #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· (identity x1 #⊗ mon_lassociator y2 x2 z1)
  #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y2, x2 ⊗ z1}
  #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) (x2 ⊗ z1) (y1 ⊗ z2) = 
?b
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
?b = middle

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symyx · symxy
· identity (x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2))
  #⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· mon_rassociator (x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2)) z1 (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· mon_lassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ x2) z1
  #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· (identity x1 #⊗ mon_lassociator y2 x2 z1)
  #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y2, x2 ⊗ z1}
  #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) (x2 ⊗ z1) (y1 ⊗ z2) = 
?b
 
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symyx · symxy = ?y'

#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2

     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧

#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧

#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2

     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)

x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧

V: sym_monoidal_cat

#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧

x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧

#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧

x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V

#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧

#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧

 · identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) = ?y'

#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2

   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)

x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧

#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2

     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))

V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V

#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧

#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
