#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2
· identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2 = ?b
 apply pathsinv0, tensor_comp_id_l. 
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
identity x1
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2
    · sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2) = ?y'

        
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2 · sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2 =
?t2

        apply sym_mon_braiding_inv.
      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
(identity x1 #⊗ identity (y2 ⊗ x2))
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2)
· identity (x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2))
  #⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· mon_rassociator (x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2)) z1 (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· mon_lassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ x2) z1
  #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· (identity x1 #⊗ mon_lassociator y2 x2 z1)
  #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y2, x2 ⊗ z1}
  #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) (x2 ⊗ z1) (y1 ⊗ z2) =
middle

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
identity (x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2))
· identity (x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2))
  #⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· mon_rassociator (x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2)) z1 (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· mon_lassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ x2) z1
  #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· (identity x1 #⊗ mon_lassociator y2 x2 z1)
  #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y2, x2 ⊗ z1}
  #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) (x2 ⊗ z1) (y1 ⊗ z2) =
middle

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
identity (x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2)) #⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· mon_rassociator (x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2)) z1 (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· mon_lassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ x2) z1
  #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· (identity x1 #⊗ mon_lassociator y2 x2 z1)
  #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y2, x2 ⊗ z1}
  #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) (x2 ⊗ z1) (y1 ⊗ z2) =
middle

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
identity (x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2)) #⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· mon_rassociator (x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2)) z1 (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· mon_lassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ x2) z1
  #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· (identity x1 #⊗ mon_lassociator y2 x2 z1)
  #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y2, x2 ⊗ z1}
  #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) (x2 ⊗ z1) (y1 ⊗ z2) =
mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2 #⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2 (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2))

      (** the goal is an instance of coherence for monoidal categories *)
      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2 #⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2 (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)) =
identity (x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2)) #⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· mon_rassociator (x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2)) z1 (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· mon_lassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ x2) z1
  #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· (identity x1 #⊗ mon_lassociator y2 x2 z1)
  #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y2, x2 ⊗ z1}
  #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) (x2 ⊗ z1) (y1 ⊗ z2)

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2 #⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2 (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)) = ?b
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
?b =
identity (x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2)) #⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· mon_rassociator (x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2)) z1 (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· mon_lassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ x2) z1
  #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· (identity x1 #⊗ mon_lassociator y2 x2 z1)
  #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y2, x2 ⊗ z1}
  #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) (x2 ⊗ z1) (y1 ⊗ z2)

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2 #⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2 (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)) = ?b

        
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2 #⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2 =
?y'

        apply tensor_split.
      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
identity (x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2)) #⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
  #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2 (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)) =
identity (x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2)) #⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· mon_rassociator (x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2)) z1 (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· mon_lassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ x2) z1
  #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· (identity x1 #⊗ mon_lassociator y2 x2 z1)
  #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y2, x2 ⊗ z1}
  #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) (x2 ⊗ z1) (y1 ⊗ z2)

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
identity (x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2)) #⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
   #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2 (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
      · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
        #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2))) =
identity (x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2)) #⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_rassociator (x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2)) z1 (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
   · (mon_lassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ x2) z1
      #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
      · ((identity x1 #⊗ mon_lassociator y2 x2 z1)
         #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
         · (αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y2, x2 ⊗ z1}
            #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
            · mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) (x2 ⊗ z1)
                (y1 ⊗ z2)))))

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2 #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2 (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)) =
mon_rassociator (x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2)) z1 (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· (mon_lassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ x2) z1
   #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
   · ((identity x1 #⊗ mon_lassociator y2 x2 z1)
      #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
      · (αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y2, x2 ⊗ z1}
         #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
         · mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) (x2 ⊗ z1)
             (y1 ⊗ z2))))

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
mon_rassociator (x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2)) z1 (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· (mon_lassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ x2) z1
   #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
   · ((identity x1 #⊗ mon_lassociator y2 x2 z1)
      #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
      · (αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y2, x2 ⊗ z1}
         #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
         · mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) (x2 ⊗ z1)
             (y1 ⊗ z2)))) =
mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2 #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2 (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2))

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
identity (x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)))
· (mon_rassociator (x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2)) z1 (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
   · (mon_lassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ x2) z1
      #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
      · ((identity x1 #⊗ mon_lassociator y2 x2 z1)
         #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
         · (αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y2, x2 ⊗ z1}
            #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
            · mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) (x2 ⊗ z1)
                (y1 ⊗ z2))))) =
mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2 #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2 (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2))

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
mon_lassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ x2) (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
· mon_rassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ x2) (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
· (mon_rassociator (x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2)) z1 (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
   · (mon_lassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ x2) z1
      #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
      · ((identity x1 #⊗ mon_lassociator y2 x2 z1)
         #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
         · (αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y2, x2 ⊗ z1}
            #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
            · mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) (x2 ⊗ z1)
                (y1 ⊗ z2))))) =
mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2 #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2 (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2))

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
mon_lassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ x2) (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
· (mon_rassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ x2) (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · (mon_rassociator (x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2)) z1
        (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
      · (mon_lassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ x2) z1
         #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
         · ((identity x1 #⊗ mon_lassociator y2 x2 z1)
            #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
            · (αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y2, x2 ⊗ z1}
               #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
               · mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) (x2 ⊗ z1)
                   (y1 ⊗ z2)))))) =
mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2 #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2 (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2))

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
mon_lassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ x2) (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
· (mon_rassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ x2) (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · (mon_rassociator (x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2)) z1
        (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
      · (mon_lassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ x2) z1
         #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
         · ((identity x1 #⊗ mon_lassociator y2 x2 z1)
            #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
            · (αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y2, x2 ⊗ z1}
               #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
               · mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) (x2 ⊗ z1)
                   (y1 ⊗ z2)))))) = ?b
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
?b =
mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2 #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2 (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2))

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
mon_lassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ x2) (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
· (mon_rassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ x2) (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · (mon_rassociator (x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2)) z1
        (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
      · (mon_lassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ x2) z1
         #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
         · ((identity x1 #⊗ mon_lassociator y2 x2 z1)
            #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
            · (αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y2, x2 ⊗ z1}
               #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
               · mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) (x2 ⊗ z1)
                   (y1 ⊗ z2)))))) = ?b

        
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
mon_rassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ x2) (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
· (mon_rassociator (x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2)) z1 (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
   · (mon_lassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ x2) z1
      #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
      · ((identity x1 #⊗ mon_lassociator y2 x2 z1)
         #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
         · (αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y2, x2 ⊗ z1}
            #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
            · mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) (x2 ⊗ z1)
                (y1 ⊗ z2))))) = ?t2

        
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
mon_rassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ x2) (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
· mon_rassociator (x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2)) z1 (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· mon_lassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ x2) z1
  #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· (identity x1 #⊗ mon_lassociator y2 x2 z1)
  #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y2, x2 ⊗ z1}
  #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) (x2 ⊗ z1) (y1 ⊗ z2) = 
?t2

        
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
identity x1 #⊗ mon_rassociator (y2 ⊗ x2) z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)
· mon_rassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ x2 ⊗ z1) (y1 ⊗ z2)
· mon_rassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ x2) z1
  #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗ z2)
· mon_lassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ x2) z1
  #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· (identity x1 #⊗ mon_lassociator y2 x2 z1)
  #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y2, x2 ⊗ z1}
  #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) (x2 ⊗ z1) (y1 ⊗ z2) = 
?t2

        
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
identity x1 #⊗ mon_rassociator (y2 ⊗ x2) z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)
· (mon_rassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ x2 ⊗ z1) (y1 ⊗ z2)
   · (mon_rassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ x2) z1
      #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗ z2)
      · (mon_lassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ x2) z1
         #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
         · ((identity x1 #⊗ mon_lassociator y2 x2 z1)
            #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
            · (αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y2, x2 ⊗ z1}
               #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
               · mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) (x2 ⊗ z1)
                   (y1 ⊗ z2)))))) = ?t2

        
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
mon_rassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ x2) z1 #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗ z2)
· (mon_lassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ x2) z1
   #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
   · ((identity x1 #⊗ mon_lassociator y2 x2 z1)
      #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
      · (αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y2, x2 ⊗ z1}
         #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
         · mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) (x2 ⊗ z1)
             (y1 ⊗ z2)))) = ?t2

        
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
mon_rassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ x2) z1 #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗ z2)
· mon_lassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ x2) z1
  #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· (identity x1 #⊗ mon_lassociator y2 x2 z1)
  #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y2, x2 ⊗ z1}
  #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗_{ V} z2)
· mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) (x2 ⊗ z1) (y1 ⊗ z2) = 
?t2

        
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
(mon_rassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ x2) z1
 · mon_lassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ x2) z1
 · identity x1 #⊗ mon_lassociator y2 x2 z1
 · αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y2, x2 ⊗ z1})
#⊗ identity (y1 ⊗ z2)
· mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) (x2 ⊗ z1) (y1 ⊗ z2) = 
?t2

        
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
(identity (x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2 ⊗ z1))
 · identity x1 #⊗ mon_lassociator y2 x2 z1
 · αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y2, x2 ⊗ z1})
#⊗ identity (y1 ⊗ z2)
· mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) (x2 ⊗ z1) (y1 ⊗ z2) = 
?t2

        
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
(identity x1 #⊗ mon_lassociator y2 x2 z1
 · αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y2, x2 ⊗ z1})
#⊗ identity (y1 ⊗ z2)
· mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) (x2 ⊗ z1) (y1 ⊗ z2) = 
?t2

        
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
(identity x1 #⊗ mon_lassociator y2 x2 z1)
#⊗ identity (y1 ⊗ z2)
· αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y2, x2 ⊗ z1} #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗ z2)
· mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) (x2 ⊗ z1) (y1 ⊗ z2) = 
?t2

        apply idpath.
      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
mon_lassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ x2) (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
· (identity x1
   #⊗ mon_rassociator (y2 ⊗ x2) z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)
   · (mon_rassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ x2 ⊗ z1) (y1 ⊗ z2)
      · ((identity x1 #⊗ mon_lassociator y2 x2 z1)
         #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗ z2)
         · αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y2, x2 ⊗ z1}
           #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗ z2)
         · mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) (x2 ⊗ z1)
             (y1 ⊗ z2)))) =
mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2 #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2 (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2))

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
mon_lassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ x2) (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
· (identity x1
   #⊗ mon_rassociator (y2 ⊗ x2) z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)
   · (mon_rassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ x2 ⊗ z1) (y1 ⊗ z2)
      · ((identity x1 #⊗ mon_lassociator y2 x2 z1)
         #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗ z2)
         · αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y2, x2 ⊗ z1}
           #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗ z2)
         · mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) (x2 ⊗ z1)
             (y1 ⊗ z2)))) = ?b
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
?b =
mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2 #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2 (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2))

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
mon_lassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ x2) (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
· (identity x1
   #⊗ mon_rassociator (y2 ⊗ x2) z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)
   · (mon_rassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ x2 ⊗ z1) (y1 ⊗ z2)
      · ((identity x1 #⊗ mon_lassociator y2 x2 z1)
         #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗ z2)
         · αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y2, x2 ⊗ z1}
           #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗ z2)
         · mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) (x2 ⊗ z1)
             (y1 ⊗ z2)))) = ?b

        
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
mon_rassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ x2 ⊗ z1) (y1 ⊗ z2)
· ((identity x1 #⊗ mon_lassociator y2 x2 z1)
   #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗ z2)
   · αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y2, x2 ⊗ z1}
     #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗ z2)
   · mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) (x2 ⊗ z1) (y1 ⊗ z2)) =
?t2

        
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
mon_rassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ x2 ⊗ z1) (y1 ⊗ z2)
· (identity x1 #⊗ mon_lassociator y2 x2 z1)
  #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗ z2)
· αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y2, x2 ⊗ z1} #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗ z2)
· mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) (x2 ⊗ z1) (y1 ⊗ z2) = 
?t2

        
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
identity x1
#⊗ (mon_lassociator y2 x2 z1 #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗ z2))
· mon_rassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1)) (y1 ⊗ z2)
· αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y2, x2 ⊗ z1} #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗ z2)
· mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) (x2 ⊗ z1) (y1 ⊗ z2) = 
?t2

        apply idpath.
      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
mon_lassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ x2) (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
· (identity x1
   #⊗ mon_rassociator (y2 ⊗ x2) z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)
   · (identity x1
      #⊗ (mon_lassociator y2 x2 z1
          #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗ z2))
      · mon_rassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1)) (y1 ⊗ z2)
      · αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y2, x2 ⊗ z1}
        #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗ z2)
      · mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) (x2 ⊗ z1) (y1 ⊗ z2))) =
mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2 #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2 (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2))

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
mon_lassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ x2) (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
· (identity x1
   #⊗ mon_rassociator (y2 ⊗ x2) z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)
   · (identity x1
      #⊗ (mon_lassociator y2 x2 z1
          #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗ z2))
      · (mon_rassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1)) (y1 ⊗ z2)
         · (αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y2, x2 ⊗ z1}
            #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗ z2)
            · mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) (x2 ⊗ z1)
                (y1 ⊗ z2))))) =
mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2 #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2 (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2))

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
mon_lassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ x2) (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
· (identity x1
   #⊗ mon_rassociator (y2 ⊗ x2) z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)
   · (identity x1
      #⊗ (mon_lassociator y2 x2 z1
          #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗ z2))
      · (mon_rassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1)) (y1 ⊗ z2)
         · (αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y2, x2 ⊗ z1}
            #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗ z2)
            · mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) (x2 ⊗ z1)
                (y1 ⊗ z2))))) = ?b
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
?b =
mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2 #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2 (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2))

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
mon_lassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ x2) (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
· (identity x1
   #⊗ mon_rassociator (y2 ⊗ x2) z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)
   · (identity x1
      #⊗ (mon_lassociator y2 x2 z1
          #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗ z2))
      · (mon_rassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1)) (y1 ⊗ z2)
         · (αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y2, x2 ⊗ z1}
            #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗ z2)
            · mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) (x2 ⊗ z1)
                (y1 ⊗ z2))))) = ?b

        
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
mon_rassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1)) (y1 ⊗ z2)
· (αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y2, x2 ⊗ z1} #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗ z2)
   · mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) (x2 ⊗ z1) (y1 ⊗ z2)) =
?t2

        
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
identity (x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1) ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)))
· (mon_rassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1)) (y1 ⊗ z2)
   · (αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y2, x2 ⊗ z1}
      #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗ z2)
      · mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) (x2 ⊗ z1) (y1 ⊗ z2))) =
?t2

        
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
identity x1 #⊗ identity (y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1) ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
· (mon_rassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1)) (y1 ⊗ z2)
   · (αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y2, x2 ⊗ z1}
      #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗ z2)
      · mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) (x2 ⊗ z1) (y1 ⊗ z2))) =
?t2

        
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
identity x1
#⊗ (mon_lassociator y2 (x2 ⊗ z1) (y1 ⊗ z2)
    · mon_rassociator y2 (x2 ⊗ z1) (y1 ⊗ z2))
· (mon_rassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1)) (y1 ⊗ z2)
   · (αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y2, x2 ⊗ z1}
      #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗ z2)
      · mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) (x2 ⊗ z1) (y1 ⊗ z2))) =
?t2

        
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
identity x1 #⊗ mon_lassociator y2 (x2 ⊗ z1) (y1 ⊗ z2)
· identity x1
  #⊗ mon_rassociator y2 (x2 ⊗ z1) (y1 ⊗ z2)
· (mon_rassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1)) (y1 ⊗ z2)
   · (αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y2, x2 ⊗ z1}
      #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗ z2)
      · mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) (x2 ⊗ z1) (y1 ⊗ z2))) =
?t2

        
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
identity x1 #⊗ mon_lassociator y2 (x2 ⊗ z1) (y1 ⊗ z2)
· (identity x1
   #⊗ mon_rassociator y2 (x2 ⊗ z1) (y1 ⊗ z2)
   · (mon_rassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1)) (y1 ⊗ z2)
      · (αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y2, x2 ⊗ z1}
         #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗ z2)
         · mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) (x2 ⊗ z1)
             (y1 ⊗ z2)))) = ?t2

        
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
identity x1 #⊗ mon_rassociator y2 (x2 ⊗ z1) (y1 ⊗ z2)
· (mon_rassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1)) (y1 ⊗ z2)
   · (αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y2, x2 ⊗ z1}
      #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗ z2)
      · mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) (x2 ⊗ z1) (y1 ⊗ z2))) =
?t2

        
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
identity x1 #⊗ mon_rassociator y2 (x2 ⊗ z1) (y1 ⊗ z2)
· mon_rassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1)) (y1 ⊗ z2)
· αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y2, x2 ⊗ z1} #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗ z2)
· mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) (x2 ⊗ z1) (y1 ⊗ z2) = 
?t2

        
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
identity x1 #⊗ mon_rassociator y2 (x2 ⊗ z1) (y1 ⊗ z2)
· mon_rassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1)) (y1 ⊗ z2)
· αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y2, x2 ⊗ z1} #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗ z2) =
?y'

        
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
?y' =
identity x1 #⊗ mon_rassociator y2 (x2 ⊗ z1) (y1 ⊗ z2)
· mon_rassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1)) (y1 ⊗ z2)
· αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y2, x2 ⊗ z1} #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗ z2)

        apply mon_rassociator_rassociator.
      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
mon_lassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ x2) (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
· (identity x1
   #⊗ mon_rassociator (y2 ⊗ x2) z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)
   · (identity x1
      #⊗ (mon_lassociator y2 x2 z1
          #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗ z2))
      · (identity x1
         #⊗ mon_lassociator y2 (x2 ⊗ z1) (y1 ⊗ z2)
         · (mon_rassociator x1 y2
              (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
            · mon_rassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) (x2 ⊗ z1)
                (y1 ⊗ z2)
            · mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) (x2 ⊗ z1)
                (y1 ⊗ z2))))) =
mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2 #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2 (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2))

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
mon_lassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ x2) (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
· (identity x1
   #⊗ mon_rassociator (y2 ⊗ x2) z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)
   · (identity x1
      #⊗ (mon_lassociator y2 x2 z1
          #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗ z2))
      · (identity x1
         #⊗ mon_lassociator y2 (x2 ⊗ z1) (y1 ⊗ z2)
         · (mon_rassociator x1 y2
              (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
            · (mon_rassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) (x2 ⊗ z1)
                 (y1 ⊗ z2)
               · mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) (x2 ⊗ z1)
                   (y1 ⊗ z2)))))) =
mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2 #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2 (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2))

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
mon_lassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ x2) (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
· (identity x1
   #⊗ mon_rassociator (y2 ⊗ x2) z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)
   · (identity x1
      #⊗ (mon_lassociator y2 x2 z1
          #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗ z2))
      · (identity x1
         #⊗ mon_lassociator y2 (x2 ⊗ z1) (y1 ⊗ z2)
         · (mon_rassociator x1 y2
              (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
            · identity
                (x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))))))) =
mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2 #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2 (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2))

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
mon_lassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ x2) (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
· (identity x1
   #⊗ mon_rassociator (y2 ⊗ x2) z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)
   · (identity x1
      #⊗ (mon_lassociator y2 x2 z1
          #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗ z2))
      · (identity x1
         #⊗ mon_lassociator y2 (x2 ⊗ z1) (y1 ⊗ z2)
         · mon_rassociator x1 y2 (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))))) =
mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2 #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2 (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2))

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
mon_lassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ x2) (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
· (identity x1
   #⊗ mon_rassociator (y2 ⊗ x2) z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)
   · (identity x1
      #⊗ (mon_lassociator y2 x2 z1
          #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗ z2))
      · (identity x1
         #⊗ mon_lassociator y2 (x2 ⊗ z1) (y1 ⊗ z2)
         · mon_rassociator x1 y2 (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))))) =
mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2 #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2 (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2))
· identity (x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)))

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
mon_lassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ x2) (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
· (identity x1
   #⊗ mon_rassociator (y2 ⊗ x2) z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)
   · (identity x1
      #⊗ (mon_lassociator y2 x2 z1
          #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗ z2))
      · (identity x1
         #⊗ mon_lassociator y2 (x2 ⊗ z1) (y1 ⊗ z2)
         · mon_rassociator x1 y2 (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))))) =
mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2 #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2 (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2))
· (mon_lassociator x1 y2 (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · mon_rassociator x1 y2 (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)))

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
mon_lassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ x2) (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
· identity x1
  #⊗ mon_rassociator (y2 ⊗ x2) z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)
· identity x1
  #⊗ (mon_lassociator y2 x2 z1 #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗ z2))
· identity x1
  #⊗ mon_lassociator y2 (x2 ⊗ z1) (y1 ⊗ z2)
· mon_rassociator x1 y2 (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) =
mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2 #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
· mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2 (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
· identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
  #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)
· mon_lassociator x1 y2 (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
· mon_rassociator x1 y2 (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
mon_lassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ x2) (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
· identity x1
  #⊗ mon_rassociator (y2 ⊗ x2) z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)
· identity x1
  #⊗ (mon_lassociator y2 x2 z1 #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗ z2))
· identity x1
  #⊗ mon_lassociator y2 (x2 ⊗ z1) (y1 ⊗ z2) =
mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2 #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
· mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2 (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
· identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
  #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)
· mon_lassociator x1 y2 (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
mon_lassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ x2) (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
· (identity x1
   #⊗ mon_rassociator (y2 ⊗ x2) z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)
   · (identity x1
      #⊗ (mon_lassociator y2 x2 z1
          #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗ z2))
      · identity x1
        #⊗ mon_lassociator y2 (x2 ⊗ z1) (y1 ⊗ z2))) =
mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2 #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2 (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · (identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
      #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)
      · mon_lassociator x1 y2 (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))))

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2 #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2 (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · (identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
      #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)
      · mon_lassociator x1 y2 (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)))) =
mon_lassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ x2) (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
· (identity x1
   #⊗ mon_rassociator (y2 ⊗ x2) z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)
   · (identity x1
      #⊗ (mon_lassociator y2 x2 z1
          #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗ z2))
      · identity x1
        #⊗ mon_lassociator y2 (x2 ⊗ z1) (y1 ⊗ z2)))

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2 #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2 (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · (identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
      #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)
      · mon_lassociator x1 y2 (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)))) =
?b
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
?b =
mon_lassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ x2) (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
· (identity x1
   #⊗ mon_rassociator (y2 ⊗ x2) z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)
   · (identity x1
      #⊗ (mon_lassociator y2 x2 z1
          #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗ z2))
      · identity x1
        #⊗ mon_lassociator y2 (x2 ⊗ z1) (y1 ⊗ z2)))

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2 #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2 (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · (identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
      #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)
      · mon_lassociator x1 y2 (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)))) =
?b

        
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
identity (x1 ⊗ y2) #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)
· mon_lassociator x1 y2 (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) = ?t2

        
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
(identity x1 #⊗ identity y2)
#⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)
· mon_lassociator x1 y2 (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) = ?t2

        apply tensor_lassociator.
      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
middle:= mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2
#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧
symyx:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V y2 x2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗_{ V} (x2 ⊗_{ V} y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
symxy:= (identity x1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧
mon_rassociator x1 y2 x2 #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2 (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · (mon_lassociator x1 y2 (x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)))
      · identity x1
        #⊗ (identity y2
            #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)))) =
mon_lassociator x1 (y2 ⊗ x2) (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
· (identity x1
   #⊗ mon_rassociator (y2 ⊗ x2) z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)
   · (identity x1
      #⊗ (mon_lassociator y2 x2 z1
          #⊗ identity (y1 ⊗ z2))
      · identity x1
        #⊗ mon_lassociator y2 (x2 ⊗ z1) (y1 ⊗ z2)))

x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V

#⊗ mon_lassociator z1 y1 z2
· (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ y2) x2
     (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2))
   · identity (x1 ⊗ y2)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),
x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)) ⟧

#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2): V ⟦ x1 ⊗ y2 ⊗_{ pr1 V} x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2),

x1 ⊗ (y2 ⊗ x2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ z2) ⟧

   · (mon_lassociator x1 y2 (x2 ⊗ (z1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ z2)))
      · identity x1
        #⊗ (identity y2
            #⊗ mon_rassociator x2 z1 (y1 ⊗ z2)))) =
