      · (inner_swap x1 y1 x2 y2 #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ z2)
         · mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ x2) (y1 ⊗ y2)
             (z1 ⊗ z2)))) =
mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ x2) (y1 ⊗ y2) (z1 ⊗ z2)

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
inner_swap x1 x2 y1 y2 #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ z2)
· (inner_swap (x1 ⊗ y1) (x2 ⊗ y2) z1 z2
   · (inner_swap (x1 ⊗ y1) z1 (x2 ⊗ y2) z2
      · (inner_swap x1 y1 x2 y2 #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ z2)
         · mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ x2) (y1 ⊗ y2)
             (z1 ⊗ z2)))) = ?b
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
?b = mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ x2) (y1 ⊗ y2) (z1 ⊗ z2)

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
inner_swap x1 x2 y1 y2 #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ z2)
· (inner_swap (x1 ⊗ y1) (x2 ⊗ y2) z1 z2
   · (inner_swap (x1 ⊗ y1) z1 (x2 ⊗ y2) z2
      · (inner_swap x1 y1 x2 y2 #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ z2)
         · mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ x2) (y1 ⊗ y2)
             (z1 ⊗ z2)))) = ?b

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
inner_swap (x1 ⊗ y1) (x2 ⊗ y2) z1 z2
· (inner_swap (x1 ⊗ y1) z1 (x2 ⊗ y2) z2
   · (inner_swap x1 y1 x2 y2 #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ z2)
      · mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ x2) (y1 ⊗ y2) (z1 ⊗ z2))) =
?t2

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
inner_swap (x1 ⊗ y1) (x2 ⊗ y2) z1 z2
· inner_swap (x1 ⊗ y1) z1 (x2 ⊗ y2) z2
· inner_swap x1 y1 x2 y2 #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ z2)
· mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ x2) (y1 ⊗ y2) (z1 ⊗ z2) = 
?t2

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
identity (x1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ (x2 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ z2))
· inner_swap x1 y1 x2 y2 #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ z2)
· mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ x2) (y1 ⊗ y2) (z1 ⊗ z2) = 
?t2

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
inner_swap x1 y1 x2 y2 #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ z2)
· mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ x2) (y1 ⊗ y2) (z1 ⊗ z2) = 
?t2

      apply idpath.
    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
inner_swap x1 x2 y1 y2 #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ z2)
· (inner_swap x1 y1 x2 y2 #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ z2)
   · mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ x2) (y1 ⊗ y2) (z1 ⊗ z2)) =
mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ x2) (y1 ⊗ y2) (z1 ⊗ z2)

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
inner_swap x1 x2 y1 y2 #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ z2)
· inner_swap x1 y1 x2 y2 #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ z2)
· mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ x2) (y1 ⊗ y2) (z1 ⊗ z2) =
mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ x2) (y1 ⊗ y2) (z1 ⊗ z2)

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
inner_swap x1 x2 y1 y2 #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ z2)
· inner_swap x1 y1 x2 y2 #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ z2)
· mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ x2) (y1 ⊗ y2) (z1 ⊗ z2) = 
?b
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
?b = mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ x2) (y1 ⊗ y2) (z1 ⊗ z2)

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
inner_swap x1 x2 y1 y2 #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ z2)
· inner_swap x1 y1 x2 y2 #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ z2)
· mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ x2) (y1 ⊗ y2) (z1 ⊗ z2) = 
?b

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
inner_swap x1 x2 y1 y2 #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ z2)
· inner_swap x1 y1 x2 y2 #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ z2) = ?y'

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
?y' =
inner_swap x1 x2 y1 y2 #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ z2)
· inner_swap x1 y1 x2 y2 #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ z2)

      apply tensor_comp_id_r.
    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
(inner_swap x1 x2 y1 y2 · inner_swap x1 y1 x2 y2)
#⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ z2)
· mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ x2) (y1 ⊗ y2) (z1 ⊗ z2) =
mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ x2) (y1 ⊗ y2) (z1 ⊗ z2)

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
identity (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ y2)) #⊗ identity (z1 ⊗ z2)
· mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ x2) (y1 ⊗ y2) (z1 ⊗ z2) =
mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ x2) (y1 ⊗ y2) (z1 ⊗ z2)

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: V
identity (x1 ⊗ x2 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ y2) ⊗ (z1 ⊗ z2))
· mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ x2) (y1 ⊗ y2) (z1 ⊗ z2) =
mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗ x2) (y1 ⊗ y2) (z1 ⊗ z2)

    apply id_left.
  Qed.

  
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y, z: V
inner_swap x x y y #⊗ identity (z ⊗ z)
· inner_swap (x ⊗ y) (x ⊗ y) z z
· mon_lassociator x y z #⊗ mon_lassociator x y z =
mon_lassociator (x ⊗ (λ x0 : V, x0) x) (y ⊗ y) (z ⊗ z)
· identity (x ⊗ (λ x0 : V, x0) x)
  #⊗ inner_swap y y z z
· inner_swap x x (y ⊗ z) (y ⊗ z)

  
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y, z: V
inner_swap x x y y #⊗ identity (z ⊗ z)
· inner_swap (x ⊗ y) (x ⊗ y) z z
· mon_lassociator x y z #⊗ mon_lassociator x y z =
mon_lassociator (x ⊗ (λ x0 : V, x0) x) (y ⊗ y) (z ⊗ z)
· identity (x ⊗ (λ x0 : V, x0) x)
  #⊗ inner_swap y y z z
· inner_swap x x (y ⊗ z) (y ⊗ z)

    apply inner_swap_hexagon'.
  Qed.

  
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y, z: V
identity (x ⊗ x) #⊗ inner_swap y y z z
· inner_swap x x (y ⊗ z) (y ⊗ z)
· mon_rassociator x y z #⊗ mon_rassociator x y z =
mon_rassociator (x ⊗ x) (y ⊗ y) (z ⊗ z)
· inner_swap x x y y #⊗ identity (z ⊗ z)
· inner_swap (x ⊗ y) (x ⊗ y) z z

  
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y, z: V
identity (x ⊗ x) #⊗ inner_swap y y z z
· inner_swap x x (y ⊗ z) (y ⊗ z)
· mon_rassociator x y z #⊗ mon_rassociator x y z =
mon_rassociator (x ⊗ x) (y ⊗ y) (z ⊗ z)
· inner_swap x x y y #⊗ identity (z ⊗ z)
· inner_swap (x ⊗ y) (x ⊗ y) z z

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y, z: V
t:= inner_swap_hexagon' x x y y z z: inner_swap x x y y #⊗ identity (z ⊗ z)
· inner_swap (x ⊗ y) (x ⊗ y) z z
· mon_lassociator x y z #⊗ mon_lassociator x y z =
mon_lassociator (x ⊗ x) (y ⊗ y) (z ⊗ z)
· identity (x ⊗ x) #⊗ inner_swap y y z z
· inner_swap x x (y ⊗ z) (y ⊗ z)
identity (x ⊗ x) #⊗ inner_swap y y z z
· inner_swap x x (y ⊗ z) (y ⊗ z)
· mon_rassociator x y z #⊗ mon_rassociator x y z =
mon_rassociator (x ⊗ x) (y ⊗ y) (z ⊗ z)
· inner_swap x x y y #⊗ identity (z ⊗ z)
· inner_swap (x ⊗ y) (x ⊗ y) z z

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y, z: V
t:= inner_swap_hexagon' x x y y z z: inner_swap x x y y #⊗ identity (z ⊗ z)
· inner_swap (x ⊗ y) (x ⊗ y) z z
· mon_lassociator x y z #⊗ mon_lassociator x y z =
mon_lassociator (x ⊗ x) (y ⊗ y) (z ⊗ z)
· identity (x ⊗ x) #⊗ inner_swap y y z z
· inner_swap x x (y ⊗ z) (y ⊗ z)
mon_rassociator (x ⊗ x) (y ⊗ y) (z ⊗ z)
· inner_swap x x y y #⊗ identity (z ⊗ z)
· inner_swap (x ⊗ y) (x ⊗ y) z z =
identity (x ⊗ x) #⊗ inner_swap y y z z
· inner_swap x x (y ⊗ z) (y ⊗ z)
· mon_rassociator x y z #⊗ mon_rassociator x y z

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y, z: V
t:= inner_swap_hexagon' x x y y z z: inner_swap x x y y #⊗ identity (z ⊗ z)
· inner_swap (x ⊗ y) (x ⊗ y) z z
· mon_lassociator x y z #⊗ mon_lassociator x y z =
mon_lassociator (x ⊗ x) (y ⊗ y) (z ⊗ z)
· identity (x ⊗ x) #⊗ inner_swap y y z z
· inner_swap x x (y ⊗ z) (y ⊗ z)
(λ g : V ⟦ x ⊗ (y ⊗ z) ⊗ (x ⊗ (y ⊗ z)),
       x ⊗ y ⊗ z ⊗ (x ⊗ y ⊗ z) ⟧,
 is_inverse_in_precat
   (mon_lassociator x y z #⊗ mon_lassociator x y z) g)
  (mon_rassociator x y z #⊗ mon_rassociator x y z)
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y, z: V
t:= inner_swap_hexagon' x x y y z z: inner_swap x x y y #⊗ identity (z ⊗ z)
· inner_swap (x ⊗ y) (x ⊗ y) z z
· mon_lassociator x y z #⊗ mon_lassociator x y z =
mon_lassociator (x ⊗ x) (y ⊗ y) (z ⊗ z)
· identity (x ⊗ x) #⊗ inner_swap y y z z
· inner_swap x x (y ⊗ z) (y ⊗ z)
identity (x ⊗ x) #⊗ inner_swap y y z z
· inner_swap x x (y ⊗ z) (y ⊗ z) =
mon_rassociator (x ⊗ x) (y ⊗ y) (z ⊗ z)
· inner_swap x x y y #⊗ identity (z ⊗ z)
· inner_swap (x ⊗ y) (x ⊗ y) z z
· (mon_lassociator x y z #⊗ mon_lassociator x y z,,
   mon_rassociator x y z #⊗ mon_rassociator x y z,,
   ?pr2)

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y, z: V
t:= inner_swap_hexagon' x x y y z z: inner_swap x x y y #⊗ identity (z ⊗ z)
· inner_swap (x ⊗ y) (x ⊗ y) z z
· mon_lassociator x y z #⊗ mon_lassociator x y z =
mon_lassociator (x ⊗ x) (y ⊗ y) (z ⊗ z)
· identity (x ⊗ x) #⊗ inner_swap y y z z
· inner_swap x x (y ⊗ z) (y ⊗ z)
(λ g : V ⟦ x ⊗ (y ⊗ z) ⊗ (x ⊗ (y ⊗ z)),
       x ⊗ y ⊗ z ⊗ (x ⊗ y ⊗ z) ⟧,
 is_inverse_in_precat
   (mon_lassociator x y z #⊗ mon_lassociator x y z) g)
  (mon_rassociator x y z #⊗ mon_rassociator x y z)

      apply (pr2 (is_z_iso_bifunctor_z_iso V
                    (mon_lassociator _ _ _) (mon_lassociator _ _ _)
                    (_ ,, monoidal_associatorisolaw V _ _ _)
                    (_ ,, monoidal_associatorisolaw V _ _ _))).
    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y, z: V
t:= inner_swap_hexagon' x x y y z z: inner_swap x x y y #⊗ identity (z ⊗ z)
· inner_swap (x ⊗ y) (x ⊗ y) z z
· mon_lassociator x y z #⊗ mon_lassociator x y z =
mon_lassociator (x ⊗ x) (y ⊗ y) (z ⊗ z)
· identity (x ⊗ x) #⊗ inner_swap y y z z
· inner_swap x x (y ⊗ z) (y ⊗ z)
identity (x ⊗ x) #⊗ inner_swap y y z z
· inner_swap x x (y ⊗ z) (y ⊗ z) =
mon_rassociator (x ⊗ x) (y ⊗ y) (z ⊗ z)
· inner_swap x x y y #⊗ identity (z ⊗ z)
· inner_swap (x ⊗ y) (x ⊗ y) z z
· (mon_lassociator x y z #⊗ mon_lassociator x y z,,
   mon_rassociator x y z #⊗ mon_rassociator x y z,,
   pr2
     (is_z_iso_bifunctor_z_iso V
        (mon_lassociator x y z)
        (mon_lassociator x y z)
        (αinv^{ V }_{ x, y, z},,
         monoidal_associatorisolaw V x y z)
        (αinv^{ V }_{ x, y, z},,
         monoidal_associatorisolaw V x y z)))

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y, z: V
t:= inner_swap_hexagon' x x y y z z: inner_swap x x y y #⊗ identity (z ⊗ z)
· inner_swap (x ⊗ y) (x ⊗ y) z z
· mon_lassociator x y z #⊗ mon_lassociator x y z =
mon_lassociator (x ⊗ x) (y ⊗ y) (z ⊗ z)
· identity (x ⊗ x) #⊗ inner_swap y y z z
· inner_swap x x (y ⊗ z) (y ⊗ z)
identity (x ⊗ x) #⊗ inner_swap y y z z
· inner_swap x x (y ⊗ z) (y ⊗ z) =
mon_rassociator (x ⊗ x) (y ⊗ y) (z ⊗ z)
· inner_swap x x y y #⊗ identity (z ⊗ z)
· inner_swap (x ⊗ y) (x ⊗ y) z z
· mon_lassociator x y z #⊗ mon_lassociator x y z

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y, z: V
t:= inner_swap_hexagon' x x y y z z: inner_swap x x y y #⊗ identity (z ⊗ z)
· inner_swap (x ⊗ y) (x ⊗ y) z z
· mon_lassociator x y z #⊗ mon_lassociator x y z =
mon_lassociator (x ⊗ x) (y ⊗ y) (z ⊗ z)
· identity (x ⊗ x) #⊗ inner_swap y y z z
· inner_swap x x (y ⊗ z) (y ⊗ z)
identity (x ⊗ x) #⊗ inner_swap y y z z
· inner_swap x x (y ⊗ z) (y ⊗ z) = ?b
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y, z: V
t:= inner_swap_hexagon' x x y y z z: inner_swap x x y y #⊗ identity (z ⊗ z)
· inner_swap (x ⊗ y) (x ⊗ y) z z
· mon_lassociator x y z #⊗ mon_lassociator x y z =
mon_lassociator (x ⊗ x) (y ⊗ y) (z ⊗ z)
· identity (x ⊗ x) #⊗ inner_swap y y z z
· inner_swap x x (y ⊗ z) (y ⊗ z)
?b =
mon_rassociator (x ⊗ x) (y ⊗ y) (z ⊗ z)
· inner_swap x x y y #⊗ identity (z ⊗ z)
· inner_swap (x ⊗ y) (x ⊗ y) z z
· mon_lassociator x y z #⊗ mon_lassociator x y z

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y, z: V
t:= inner_swap_hexagon' x x y y z z: inner_swap x x y y #⊗ identity (z ⊗ z)
· inner_swap (x ⊗ y) (x ⊗ y) z z
· mon_lassociator x y z #⊗ mon_lassociator x y z =
mon_lassociator (x ⊗ x) (y ⊗ y) (z ⊗ z)
· identity (x ⊗ x) #⊗ inner_swap y y z z
· inner_swap x x (y ⊗ z) (y ⊗ z)
?b =
mon_rassociator (x ⊗ x) (y ⊗ y) (z ⊗ z)
· inner_swap x x y y #⊗ identity (z ⊗ z)
· inner_swap (x ⊗ y) (x ⊗ y) z z
· mon_lassociator x y z #⊗ mon_lassociator x y z

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y, z: V
t:= inner_swap_hexagon' x x y y z z: inner_swap x x y y #⊗ identity (z ⊗ z)
· inner_swap (x ⊗ y) (x ⊗ y) z z
· mon_lassociator x y z #⊗ mon_lassociator x y z =
mon_lassociator (x ⊗ x) (y ⊗ y) (z ⊗ z)
· identity (x ⊗ x) #⊗ inner_swap y y z z
· inner_swap x x (y ⊗ z) (y ⊗ z)
?b =
mon_rassociator (x ⊗ x) (y ⊗ y) (z ⊗ z)
· (inner_swap x x y y #⊗ identity (z ⊗ z)
   · (inner_swap (x ⊗ y) (x ⊗ y) z z
      · mon_lassociator x y z #⊗ mon_lassociator x y z))

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y, z: V
t:= inner_swap_hexagon' x x y y z z: inner_swap x x y y #⊗ identity (z ⊗ z)
· inner_swap (x ⊗ y) (x ⊗ y) z z
· mon_lassociator x y z #⊗ mon_lassociator x y z =
mon_lassociator (x ⊗ x) (y ⊗ y) (z ⊗ z)
· identity (x ⊗ x) #⊗ inner_swap y y z z
· inner_swap x x (y ⊗ z) (y ⊗ z)
?t1 =
inner_swap x x y y #⊗ identity (z ⊗ z)
· (inner_swap (x ⊗ y) (x ⊗ y) z z
   · mon_lassociator x y z #⊗ mon_lassociator x y z)

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y, z: V
t:= inner_swap_hexagon' x x y y z z: inner_swap x x y y #⊗ identity (z ⊗ z)
· inner_swap (x ⊗ y) (x ⊗ y) z z
· mon_lassociator x y z #⊗ mon_lassociator x y z =
mon_lassociator (x ⊗ x) (y ⊗ y) (z ⊗ z)
· identity (x ⊗ x) #⊗ inner_swap y y z z
· inner_swap x x (y ⊗ z) (y ⊗ z)
?t1 =
inner_swap x x y y #⊗ identity (z ⊗ z)
· inner_swap (x ⊗ y) (x ⊗ y) z z
· mon_lassociator x y z #⊗ mon_lassociator x y z

      apply (! t).
    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y, z: V
t:= inner_swap_hexagon' x x y y z z: inner_swap x x y y #⊗ identity (z ⊗ z)
· inner_swap (x ⊗ y) (x ⊗ y) z z
· mon_lassociator x y z #⊗ mon_lassociator x y z =
mon_lassociator (x ⊗ x) (y ⊗ y) (z ⊗ z)
· identity (x ⊗ x) #⊗ inner_swap y y z z
· inner_swap x x (y ⊗ z) (y ⊗ z)
identity (x ⊗ x) #⊗ inner_swap y y z z
· inner_swap x x (y ⊗ z) (y ⊗ z) =
mon_rassociator (x ⊗ x) (y ⊗ y) (z ⊗ z)
· (mon_lassociator (x ⊗ x) (y ⊗ y) (z ⊗ z)
   · identity (x ⊗ x) #⊗ inner_swap y y z z
   · inner_swap x x (y ⊗ z) (y ⊗ z))

· inner_swap x x (y ⊗ z) (y ⊗ z)
identity (x ⊗ x) #⊗ inner_swap y y z z
· inner_swap x x (y ⊗ z) (y ⊗ z) = ?b

x, y, z: V
t:= inner_swap_hexagon' x x y y z z: inner_swap x x y y #⊗ identity (z ⊗ z)
· inner_swap (x ⊗ y) (x ⊗ y) z z
· mon_lassociator x y z #⊗ mon_lassociator x y z =

· identity (x ⊗ x) #⊗ inner_swap y y z z
· inner_swap x x (y ⊗ z) (y ⊗ z)

t:= inner_swap_hexagon' x x y y z z: inner_swap x x y y #⊗ identity (z ⊗ z)
· inner_swap (x ⊗ y) (x ⊗ y) z z
· mon_lassociator x y z #⊗ mon_lassociator x y z =

· inner_swap x x (y ⊗ z) (y ⊗ z)

x, y, z: V
t:= inner_swap_hexagon' x x y y z z: inner_swap x x y y #⊗ identity (z ⊗ z)
· inner_swap (x ⊗ y) (x ⊗ y) z z
· mon_lassociator x y z #⊗ mon_lassociator x y z =
mon_lassociator (x ⊗ x) (y ⊗ y) (z ⊗ z)
· identity (x ⊗ x) #⊗ inner_swap y y z z
· inner_swap x x (y ⊗ z) (y ⊗ z)
?b =
mon_rassociator (x ⊗ x) (y ⊗ y) (z ⊗ z)
· mon_lassociator (x ⊗ x) (y ⊗ y) (z ⊗ z)
· identity (x ⊗ x) #⊗ inner_swap y y z z
· inner_swap x x (y ⊗ z) (y ⊗ z)

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y, z: V
t:= inner_swap_hexagon' x x y y z z: inner_swap x x y y #⊗ identity (z ⊗ z)
· inner_swap (x ⊗ y) (x ⊗ y) z z
· mon_lassociator x y z #⊗ mon_lassociator x y z =
mon_lassociator (x ⊗ x) (y ⊗ y) (z ⊗ z)
· identity (x ⊗ x) #⊗ inner_swap y y z z
· inner_swap x x (y ⊗ z) (y ⊗ z)
?y =
mon_rassociator (x ⊗ x) (y ⊗ y) (z ⊗ z)
· mon_lassociator (x ⊗ x) (y ⊗ y) (z ⊗ z)

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y, z: V
t:= inner_swap_hexagon' x x y y z z: inner_swap x x y y #⊗ identity (z ⊗ z)
· inner_swap (x ⊗ y) (x ⊗ y) z z
· mon_lassociator x y z #⊗ mon_lassociator x y z =
mon_lassociator (x ⊗ x) (y ⊗ y) (z ⊗ z)
· identity (x ⊗ x) #⊗ inner_swap y y z z
· inner_swap x x (y ⊗ z) (y ⊗ z)
mon_rassociator (x ⊗ x) (y ⊗ y) (z ⊗ z)
· mon_lassociator (x ⊗ x) (y ⊗ y) (z ⊗ z) = ?y

      apply mon_rassociator_lassociator.
    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x, y, z: V
t:= inner_swap_hexagon' x x y y z z: inner_swap x x y y #⊗ identity (z ⊗ z)
· inner_swap (x ⊗ y) (x ⊗ y) z z
· mon_lassociator x y z #⊗ mon_lassociator x y z =
mon_lassociator (x ⊗ x) (y ⊗ y) (z ⊗ z)
· identity (x ⊗ x) #⊗ inner_swap y y z z
· inner_swap x x (y ⊗ z) (y ⊗ z)
identity (x ⊗ x) #⊗ inner_swap y y z z
· inner_swap x x (y ⊗ z) (y ⊗ z) =
identity (x ⊗ x ⊗ (y ⊗ y ⊗ (z ⊗ z)))
· identity (x ⊗ x) #⊗ inner_swap y y z z
· inner_swap x x (y ⊗ z) (y ⊗ z)

    now rewrite id_left.
  Qed.

  
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
inner_swap x1 x2 y1 y2
· sym_mon_braiding V x1 y1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2 =
sym_mon_braiding V (x1 ⊗ x2) (y1 ⊗ y2)
· inner_swap y1 y2 x1 x2

  
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
inner_swap x1 x2 y1 y2
· sym_mon_braiding V x1 y1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2 =
sym_mon_braiding V (x1 ⊗ x2) (y1 ⊗ y2)
· inner_swap y1 y2 x1 x2

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
mon_lassociator x1 x2 (y1 ⊗ y2)
· (x1
   ⊗^{ V}_{l} (mon_rassociator x2 y1 y2
               · (sym_mon_braiding V x2 y1
                  ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
                  · mon_lassociator y1 x2 y2))
   · mon_rassociator x1 y1 (x2 ⊗ y2))
· sym_mon_braiding V x1 y1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2 =
sym_mon_braiding V (x1 ⊗ x2) (y1 ⊗ y2)
· (mon_lassociator y1 y2 (x1 ⊗ x2)
   · (y1
      ⊗^{ V}_{l} (mon_rassociator y2 x1 x2
                  · (sym_mon_braiding V y2 x1
                     ⊗^{ V}_{r} x2
                     · mon_lassociator x1 y2 x2))
      · mon_rassociator y1 x1 (y2 ⊗ x2)))

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
mon_lassociator x1 x2 (y1 ⊗ y2)
· x1
  ⊗^{ V}_{l} (mon_rassociator x2 y1 y2
              · sym_mon_braiding V x2 y1 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
              · mon_lassociator y1 x2 y2)
· mon_rassociator x1 y1 (x2 ⊗ y2)
· sym_mon_braiding V x1 y1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2 =
sym_mon_braiding V (x1 ⊗ x2) (y1 ⊗ y2)
· mon_lassociator y1 y2 (x1 ⊗ x2)
· y1
  ⊗^{ V}_{l} (mon_rassociator y2 x1 x2
              · sym_mon_braiding V y2 x1 ⊗^{ V}_{r} x2
              · mon_lassociator x1 y2 x2)
· mon_rassociator y1 x1 (y2 ⊗ x2)


    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
mon_lassociator x1 x2 (y1 ⊗ y2)
· x1
  ⊗^{ V}_{l} (mon_rassociator x2 y1 y2
              · sym_mon_braiding V x2 y1 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
              · mon_lassociator y1 x2 y2)
· mon_rassociator x1 y1 (x2 ⊗ y2)
· sym_mon_braiding V x1 y1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2 =
?b
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
?b =
sym_mon_braiding V (x1 ⊗ x2) (y1 ⊗ y2)
· mon_lassociator y1 y2 (x1 ⊗ x2)
· y1
  ⊗^{ V}_{l} (mon_rassociator y2 x1 x2
              · sym_mon_braiding V y2 x1 ⊗^{ V}_{r} x2
              · mon_lassociator x1 y2 x2)
· mon_rassociator y1 x1 (y2 ⊗ x2)

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
?b =
sym_mon_braiding V (x1 ⊗ x2) (y1 ⊗ y2)
· mon_lassociator y1 y2 (x1 ⊗ x2)
· y1
  ⊗^{ V}_{l} (mon_rassociator y2 x1 x2
              · sym_mon_braiding V y2 x1 ⊗^{ V}_{r} x2
              · mon_lassociator x1 y2 x2)
· mon_rassociator y1 x1 (y2 ⊗ x2)

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
?y =
sym_mon_braiding V (x1 ⊗ x2) (y1 ⊗ y2)
· mon_lassociator y1 y2 (x1 ⊗ x2)

      apply pathsinv0, sym_mon_tensor_lassociator0.
    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
mon_lassociator x1 x2 (y1 ⊗ y2)
· x1
  ⊗^{ V}_{l} (mon_rassociator x2 y1 y2
              · sym_mon_braiding V x2 y1 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
              · mon_lassociator y1 x2 y2)
· mon_rassociator x1 y1 (x2 ⊗ y2)
· sym_mon_braiding V x1 y1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2 =
mon_rassociator (x1 ⊗ x2) y1 y2
· sym_mon_braiding V (x1 ⊗ x2) y1 #⊗ identity y2
· mon_lassociator y1 (x1 ⊗ x2) y2
· identity y1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (x1 ⊗ x2) y2
· y1
  ⊗^{ V}_{l} (mon_rassociator y2 x1 x2
              · sym_mon_braiding V y2 x1 ⊗^{ V}_{r} x2
              · mon_lassociator x1 y2 x2)
· mon_rassociator y1 x1 (y2 ⊗ x2)

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
α^{ V }_{ x1, x2, y1 ⊗ y2}
· x1
  ⊗^{ V}_{l} (αinv^{ V }_{ x2, y1, y2}
              · sym_mon_braiding V x2 y1 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
              · α^{ V }_{ y1, x2, y2})
· αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y1, x2 ⊗ y2}
· sym_mon_braiding V x1 y1
  ⊗^{ pr2 V} sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2 =
αinv^{ V }_{ x1 ⊗ x2, y1, y2}
· sym_mon_braiding V (x1 ⊗ x2) y1
  ⊗^{ pr2 V} identity y2 · α^{ V }_{ y1, x1 ⊗ x2, y2}
· identity y1
  ⊗^{ pr2 V} sym_mon_braiding V (x1 ⊗ x2) y2
· y1
  ⊗^{ V}_{l} (αinv^{ V }_{ y2, x1, x2}
              · sym_mon_braiding V y2 x1 ⊗^{ V}_{r} x2
              · α^{ V }_{ x1, y2, x2})
· αinv^{ V }_{ y1, x1, y2 ⊗ x2}

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
α^{ V }_{ x1, x2, y1 ⊗ y2}
· x1
  ⊗^{ V}_{l} (αinv^{ V }_{ x2, y1, y2}
              · (pr12 V) x2 y1 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
              · α^{ V }_{ y1, x2, y2})
· αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y1, x2 ⊗ y2}
· (pr12 V) x1 y1 ⊗^{ pr2 V} (pr12 V) x2 y2 =
αinv^{ V }_{ x1 ⊗ x2, y1, y2}
· (pr12 V) (x1 ⊗ x2) y1 ⊗^{ pr2 V} identity y2
· α^{ V }_{ y1, x1 ⊗ x2, y2}
· identity y1 ⊗^{ pr2 V} (pr12 V) (x1 ⊗ x2) y2
· y1
  ⊗^{ V}_{l} (αinv^{ V }_{ y2, x1, x2}
              · (pr12 V) y2 x1 ⊗^{ V}_{r} x2
              · α^{ V }_{ x1, y2, x2})
· αinv^{ V }_{ y1, x1, y2 ⊗ x2}


    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
α^{ V }_{ x1, x2, y1 ⊗ y2}
· x1
  ⊗^{ V}_{l} (αinv^{ V }_{ x2, y1, y2}
              · (pr12 V) x2 y1 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
              · α^{ V }_{ y1, x2, y2})
· αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y1, x2 ⊗ y2}
· (pr12 V) x1 y1 ⊗^{ pr2 V} (pr12 V) x2 y2 = ?b
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
?b =
αinv^{ V }_{ x1 ⊗ x2, y1, y2}
· (pr12 V) (x1 ⊗ x2) y1 ⊗^{ pr2 V} identity y2
· α^{ V }_{ y1, x1 ⊗ x2, y2}
· identity y1 ⊗^{ pr2 V} (pr12 V) (x1 ⊗ x2) y2
· y1
  ⊗^{ V}_{l} (αinv^{ V }_{ y2, x1, x2}
              · (pr12 V) y2 x1 ⊗^{ V}_{r} x2
              · α^{ V }_{ x1, y2, x2})
· αinv^{ V }_{ y1, x1, y2 ⊗ x2}

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
?b =
αinv^{ V }_{ x1 ⊗ x2, y1, y2}
· (pr12 V) (x1 ⊗ x2) y1 ⊗^{ pr2 V} identity y2
· α^{ V }_{ y1, x1 ⊗ x2, y2}
· identity y1 ⊗^{ pr2 V} (pr12 V) (x1 ⊗ x2) y2
· y1
  ⊗^{ V}_{l} (αinv^{ V }_{ y2, x1, x2}
              · (pr12 V) y2 x1 ⊗^{ V}_{r} x2
              · α^{ V }_{ x1, y2, x2})
· αinv^{ V }_{ y1, x1, y2 ⊗ x2}

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
?y =
αinv^{ V }_{ x1 ⊗ x2, y1, y2}
· (pr12 V) (x1 ⊗ x2) y1 ⊗^{ pr2 V} identity y2
· α^{ V }_{ y1, x1 ⊗ x2, y2}
· identity y1 ⊗^{ pr2 V} (pr12 V) (x1 ⊗ x2) y2
· y1
  ⊗^{ V}_{l} (αinv^{ V }_{ y2, x1, x2}
              · (pr12 V) y2 x1 ⊗^{ V}_{r} x2
              · α^{ V }_{ x1, y2, x2})

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
?y =
αinv^{ V }_{ x1 ⊗ x2, y1, y2}
· (pr12 V) (x1 ⊗ x2) y1 ⊗^{ pr2 V} identity y2
· α^{ V }_{ y1, x1 ⊗ x2, y2}
· (identity y1 ⊗^{ pr2 V} (pr12 V) (x1 ⊗ x2) y2
   · y1
     ⊗^{ V}_{l} (αinv^{ V }_{ y2, x1, x2}
                 · (pr12 V) y2 x1 ⊗^{ V}_{r} x2
                 · α^{ V }_{ x1, y2, x2}))

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
?t1 =
identity y1 ⊗^{ pr2 V} (pr12 V) (x1 ⊗ x2) y2
· y1
  ⊗^{ V}_{l} (αinv^{ V }_{ y2, x1, x2}
              · (pr12 V) y2 x1 ⊗^{ V}_{r} x2
              · α^{ V }_{ x1, y2, x2})

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
?t1 =
y1 ⊗^{ V}_{l} (pr12 V) (x1 ⊗ x2) y2
· y1
  ⊗^{ V}_{l} (αinv^{ V }_{ y2, x1, x2}
              · (pr12 V) y2 x1 ⊗^{ V}_{r} x2
              · α^{ V }_{ x1, y2, x2})

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
?t1 = ?b
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
?b =
y1 ⊗^{ V}_{l} (pr12 V) (x1 ⊗ x2) y2
· y1
  ⊗^{ V}_{l} (αinv^{ V }_{ y2, x1, x2}
              · (pr12 V) y2 x1 ⊗^{ V}_{r} x2
              · α^{ V }_{ x1, y2, x2})

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
?t1 =
y1
⊗^{ V}_{l} ((pr12 V) (x1 ⊗ x2) y2
            · (αinv^{ V }_{ y2, x1, x2}
               · (pr12 V) y2 x1 ⊗^{ V}_{r} x2
               · α^{ V }_{ x1, y2, x2}))

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
?t1 =
(pr12 V) (x1 ⊗ x2) y2
· (αinv^{ V }_{ y2, x1, x2}
   · (pr12 V) y2 x1 ⊗^{ V}_{r} x2
   · α^{ V }_{ x1, y2, x2})

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
?t1 =
(pr12 V) (x1 ⊗ x2) y2 · αinv^{ V }_{ y2, x1, x2}
· (pr12 V) y2 x1 ⊗^{ V}_{r} x2 · α^{ V }_{ x1, y2, x2}

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
(pr12 V) (x1 ⊗ x2) y2 · αinv^{ V }_{ y2, x1, x2}
· (pr12 V) y2 x1 ⊗^{ V}_{r} x2 · α^{ V }_{ x1, y2, x2} =
?t1

      apply sym_mon_hexagon_rassociator0.
    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
α^{ V }_{ x1, x2, y1 ⊗ y2}
· x1
  ⊗^{ V}_{l} (αinv^{ V }_{ x2, y1, y2}
              · (pr12 V) x2 y1 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
              · α^{ V }_{ y1, x2, y2})
· αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y1, x2 ⊗ y2}
· (pr12 V) x1 y1 ⊗^{ pr2 V} (pr12 V) x2 y2 =
αinv^{ V }_{ x1 ⊗ x2, y1, y2}
· (pr12 V) (x1 ⊗ x2) y1 ⊗^{ pr2 V} identity y2
· α^{ V }_{ y1, x1 ⊗ x2, y2}
· y1
  ⊗^{ V}_{l} (mon_lassociator x1 x2 y2
              · x1 ⊗^{ V}_{l} sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
· αinv^{ V }_{ y1, x1, y2 ⊗ x2}


    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
α^{ V }_{ x1, x2, y1 ⊗ y2}
· x1
  ⊗^{ V}_{l} (αinv^{ V }_{ x2, y1, y2}
              · (pr12 V) x2 y1 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
              · α^{ V }_{ y1, x2, y2})
· αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y1, x2 ⊗ y2}
· (pr12 V) x1 y1 ⊗^{ pr2 V} (pr12 V) x2 y2 = ?b
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
?b =
αinv^{ V }_{ x1 ⊗ x2, y1, y2}
· (pr12 V) (x1 ⊗ x2) y1 ⊗^{ pr2 V} identity y2
· α^{ V }_{ y1, x1 ⊗ x2, y2}
· y1
  ⊗^{ V}_{l} (mon_lassociator x1 x2 y2
              · x1 ⊗^{ V}_{l} sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
· αinv^{ V }_{ y1, x1, y2 ⊗ x2}

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
?b =
αinv^{ V }_{ x1 ⊗ x2, y1, y2}
· (pr12 V) (x1 ⊗ x2) y1 ⊗^{ pr2 V} identity y2
· α^{ V }_{ y1, x1 ⊗ x2, y2}
· y1
  ⊗^{ V}_{l} (mon_lassociator x1 x2 y2
              · x1 ⊗^{ V}_{l} sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
· αinv^{ V }_{ y1, x1, y2 ⊗ x2}

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
?b =
αinv^{ V }_{ x1 ⊗ x2, y1, y2}
· ((pr12 V) (x1 ⊗ x2) y1 ⊗^{ pr2 V} identity y2
   · (α^{ V }_{ y1, x1 ⊗ x2, y2}
      · (y1
         ⊗^{ V}_{l} (mon_lassociator x1 x2 y2
                     · x1
                       ⊗^{ V}_{l} sym_mon_braiding V
                                    x2 y2)
         · αinv^{ V }_{ y1, x1, y2 ⊗ x2})))

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
?t1 =
α^{ V }_{ y1, x1 ⊗ x2, y2}
· (y1
   ⊗^{ V}_{l} (mon_lassociator x1 x2 y2
               · x1
                 ⊗^{ V}_{l} sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
   · αinv^{ V }_{ y1, x1, y2 ⊗ x2})

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
mon_lassociator y1 (x1 ⊗ x2) y2
· y1
  ⊗^{ V}_{l} (mon_lassociator x1 x2 y2
              · x1 ⊗^{ V}_{l} sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
· mon_rassociator y1 x1 (y2 ⊗ x2) =
α^{ V }_{ y1, x1 ⊗ x2, y2}
· (y1
   ⊗^{ V}_{l} (mon_lassociator x1 x2 y2
               · x1
                 ⊗^{ V}_{l} sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2)
   · αinv^{ V }_{ y1, x1, y2 ⊗ x2})

      now rewrite ! assoc'.
    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
α^{ V }_{ x1, x2, y1 ⊗ y2}
· x1
  ⊗^{ V}_{l} (αinv^{ V }_{ x2, y1, y2}
              · (pr12 V) x2 y1 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
              · α^{ V }_{ y1, x2, y2})
· αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y1, x2 ⊗ y2}
· (pr12 V) x1 y1 ⊗^{ pr2 V} (pr12 V) x2 y2 =
αinv^{ V }_{ x1 ⊗ x2, y1, y2}
· ((pr12 V) (x1 ⊗ x2) y1 ⊗^{ pr2 V} identity y2
   · (mon_rassociator y1 x1 x2 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
      · mon_lassociator (y1 ⊗ x1) x2 y2
      · (y1 ⊗ x1) ⊗^{ V}_{l} sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2))


    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
α^{ V }_{ x1, x2, y1 ⊗ y2}
· x1
  ⊗^{ V}_{l} (αinv^{ V }_{ x2, y1, y2}
              · (pr12 V) x2 y1 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
              · α^{ V }_{ y1, x2, y2})
· αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y1, x2 ⊗ y2}
· ((pr12 V) x1 y1 ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} (x2 ⊗ y2)
   · (y1 ⊗ x1) ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{l} (pr12 V) x2 y2) =
αinv^{ V }_{ x1 ⊗ x2, y1, y2}
· ((pr12 V) (x1 ⊗ x2) y1 ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} y2
   · (y1 ⊗ (x1 ⊗ x2)) ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{l} identity y2
   · (mon_rassociator y1 x1 x2 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
      · mon_lassociator (y1 ⊗ x1) x2 y2
      · (y1 ⊗ x1) ⊗^{ V}_{l} sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2))

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
α^{ V }_{ x1, x2, y1 ⊗ y2}
· x1
  ⊗^{ V}_{l} (αinv^{ V }_{ x2, y1, y2}
              · (pr12 V) x2 y1 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
              · α^{ V }_{ y1, x2, y2})
· αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y1, x2 ⊗ y2}
· (pr12 V) x1 y1 ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} (x2 ⊗ y2)
· (y1 ⊗ x1) ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{l} (pr12 V) x2 y2 =
αinv^{ V }_{ x1 ⊗ x2, y1, y2}
· (pr12 V) (x1 ⊗ x2) y1 ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} y2
· (y1 ⊗ (x1 ⊗ x2)) ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{l} identity y2
· mon_rassociator y1 x1 x2 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
· mon_lassociator (y1 ⊗ x1) x2 y2
· (y1 ⊗ x1) ⊗^{ V}_{l} sym_mon_braiding V x2 y2

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
α^{ V }_{ x1, x2, y1 ⊗ y2}
· x1
  ⊗^{ V}_{l} (αinv^{ V }_{ x2, y1, y2}
              · (pr12 V) x2 y1 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
              · α^{ V }_{ y1, x2, y2})
· αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y1, x2 ⊗ y2}
· (pr12 V) x1 y1 ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} (x2 ⊗ y2) =
αinv^{ V }_{ x1 ⊗ x2, y1, y2}
· (pr12 V) (x1 ⊗ x2) y1 ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} y2
· (y1 ⊗ (x1 ⊗ x2)) ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{l} identity y2
· mon_rassociator y1 x1 x2 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
· mon_lassociator (y1 ⊗ x1) x2 y2

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
α^{ V }_{ x1, x2, y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2}
· x1
  ⊗^{ V}_{l} (αinv^{ V }_{ x2, y1, y2}
              · (pr12 V) x2 y1 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
              · α^{ V }_{ y1, x2, y2})
· αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y1, x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2}
· (pr12 V) x1 y1 ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} (x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2) =
αinv^{ V }_{ x1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2, y1, y2}
· (pr12 V) (x1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2) y1 ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} y2
· (y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} (x1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2))
  ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{l} identity y2
· mon_rassociator y1 x1 x2 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
· mon_lassociator (y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x1) x2 y2

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
α^{ V }_{ x1, x2, y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2}
· x1
  ⊗^{ V}_{l} (αinv^{ V }_{ x2, y1, y2}
              · (pr12 V) x2 y1 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
              · α^{ V }_{ y1, x2, y2})
· αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y1, x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2}
· (pr12 V) x1 y1 ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} (x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2) =
αinv^{ V }_{ x1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2, y1, y2}
· (pr12 V) (x1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2) y1 ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} y2
· (y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} (x1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2))
  ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{l} identity y2
· mon_rassociator y1 x1 x2 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
· mon_lassociator (y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x1) x2 y2


    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
α^{ V }_{ x1, x2, y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2}
· (x1
   ⊗^{ V}_{l} (αinv^{ V }_{ x2, y1, y2}
               · ((pr12 V) x2 y1 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
                  · α^{ V }_{ y1, x2, y2}))
   · (αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y1, x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2}
      · (pr12 V) x1 y1
        ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} (x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2))) =
αinv^{ V }_{ x1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2, y1, y2}
· ((pr12 V) (x1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2) y1 ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} y2
   · ((y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} (x1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2))
      ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{l} identity y2
      · (mon_rassociator y1 x1 x2 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
         · mon_lassociator (y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x1) x2 y2)))

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
αinv^{ V }_{ x1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2, y1, y2}
· ((pr12 V) (x1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2) y1 ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} y2
   · ((y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} (x1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2))
      ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{l} identity y2
      · (mon_rassociator y1 x1 x2 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
         · mon_lassociator (y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x1) x2 y2))) =
α^{ V }_{ x1, x2, y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2}
· (x1
   ⊗^{ V}_{l} (αinv^{ V }_{ x2, y1, y2}
               · ((pr12 V) x2 y1 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
                  · α^{ V }_{ y1, x2, y2}))
   · (αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y1, x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2}
      · (pr12 V) x1 y1
        ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} (x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2)))

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
(λ g : V ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ y2),
       x1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2 ⊗ y1 ⊗ y2 ⟧,
 is_inverse_in_precat
   (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2) y1 y2) g)
  (mon_rassociator (x1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2) y1 y2)
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
(pr12 V) (x1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2) y1 ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} y2
· ((y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} (x1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2))
   ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{l} identity y2
   · (mon_rassociator y1 x1 x2 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
      · mon_lassociator (y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x1) x2 y2)) =
(mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2) y1 y2,,
 mon_rassociator (x1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2) y1 y2,, ?pr2)
· (α^{ V }_{ x1, x2, y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2}
   · (x1
      ⊗^{ V}_{l} (αinv^{ V }_{ x2, y1, y2}
                  · ((pr12 V) x2 y1 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
                     · α^{ V }_{ y1, x2, y2}))
      · (αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y1, x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2}
         · (pr12 V) x1 y1
           ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} (x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2))))

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
(λ g : V ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ y2),
       x1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2 ⊗ y1 ⊗ y2 ⟧,
 is_inverse_in_precat
   (mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2) y1 y2) g)
  (mon_rassociator (x1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2) y1 y2)
 apply monoidal_associatorisolaw. 
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
(pr12 V) (x1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2) y1 ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} y2
· ((y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} (x1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2))
   ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{l} identity y2
   · (mon_rassociator y1 x1 x2 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
      · mon_lassociator (y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x1) x2 y2)) =
(mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2) y1 y2,,
 mon_rassociator (x1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2) y1 y2,,
 monoidal_associatorisolaw (pr2 V) (x1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2)
   y1 y2)
· (α^{ V }_{ x1, x2, y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2}
   · (x1
      ⊗^{ V}_{l} (αinv^{ V }_{ x2, y1, y2}
                  · ((pr12 V) x2 y1 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
                     · α^{ V }_{ y1, x2, y2}))
      · (αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y1, x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2}
         · (pr12 V) x1 y1
           ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} (x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2))))

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
(pr12 V) (x1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2) y1 ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} y2
· ((y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} (x1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2))
   ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{l} identity y2
   · (mon_rassociator y1 x1 x2 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
      · mon_lassociator (y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x1) x2 y2)) =
mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2) y1 y2
· (α^{ V }_{ x1, x2, y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2}
   · (x1
      ⊗^{ V}_{l} (αinv^{ V }_{ x2, y1, y2}
                  · ((pr12 V) x2 y1 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
                     · α^{ V }_{ y1, x2, y2}))
      · (αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y1, x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2}
         · (pr12 V) x1 y1
           ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} (x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2))))


    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
(pr12 V) (x1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2) y1 ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} y2
· ((y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} (x1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2))
   ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{l} identity y2
   · (mon_rassociator y1 x1 x2 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
      · mon_lassociator (y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x1) x2 y2)) =
mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2) y1 y2
· (α^{ V }_{ x1, x2, y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2}
   · (x1 ⊗^{ V}_{l} αinv^{ V }_{ x2, y1, y2}
      · x1
        ⊗^{ V}_{l} ((pr12 V) x2 y1 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
                    · α^{ V }_{ y1, x2, y2})
      · (αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y1, x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2}
         · (pr12 V) x1 y1
           ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} (x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2))))

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
(pr12 V) (x1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2) y1 ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} y2
· (y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} (x1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2))
  ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{l} identity y2
· mon_rassociator y1 x1 x2 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
· mon_lassociator (y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x1) x2 y2 =
mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2) y1 y2
· α^{ V }_{ x1, x2, y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2}
· x1 ⊗^{ V}_{l} αinv^{ V }_{ x2, y1, y2}
· x1
  ⊗^{ V}_{l} ((pr12 V) x2 y1 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
              · α^{ V }_{ y1, x2, y2})
· αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y1, x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2}
· (pr12 V) x1 y1 ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} (x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2)


    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
(pr12 V) (x1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2) y1 ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} y2
· (y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} (x1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2))
  ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{l} identity y2
· mon_rassociator y1 x1 x2 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
· mon_lassociator (y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x1) x2 y2 = ?b
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
?b =
mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2) y1 y2
· α^{ V }_{ x1, x2, y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2}
· x1 ⊗^{ V}_{l} αinv^{ V }_{ x2, y1, y2}
· x1
  ⊗^{ V}_{l} ((pr12 V) x2 y1 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
              · α^{ V }_{ y1, x2, y2})
· αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y1, x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2}
· (pr12 V) x1 y1 ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} (x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2)

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
?b =
mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2) y1 y2
· α^{ V }_{ x1, x2, y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2}
· x1 ⊗^{ V}_{l} αinv^{ V }_{ x2, y1, y2}
· x1
  ⊗^{ V}_{l} ((pr12 V) x2 y1 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
              · α^{ V }_{ y1, x2, y2})
· αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y1, x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2}
· (pr12 V) x1 y1 ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} (x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2)

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
?y =
mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2) y1 y2
· α^{ V }_{ x1, x2, y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2}
· x1 ⊗^{ V}_{l} αinv^{ V }_{ x2, y1, y2}

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
mon_lassociator (x1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2) y1 y2
· α^{ V }_{ x1, x2, y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2}
· x1 ⊗^{ V}_{l} αinv^{ V }_{ x2, y1, y2} = ?y

      apply mon_lassociator_lassociator'.
    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
(pr12 V) (x1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2) y1 ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} y2
· (y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} (x1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2))
  ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{l} identity y2
· mon_rassociator y1 x1 x2 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
· mon_lassociator (y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x1) x2 y2 =
mon_lassociator x1 x2 y1 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
· mon_lassociator x1 (x2 ⊗ y1) y2
· x1
  ⊗^{ V}_{l} ((pr12 V) x2 y1 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
              · α^{ V }_{ y1, x2, y2})
· αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y1, x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2}
· (pr12 V) x1 y1 ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} (x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2)

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
(pr12 V) (x1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2) y1 ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} y2
· identity
    ((y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} (x1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2)) ⊗_{ V} y2)
· mon_rassociator y1 x1 x2 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
· mon_lassociator (y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x1) x2 y2 =
mon_lassociator x1 x2 y1 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
· mon_lassociator x1 (x2 ⊗ y1) y2
· x1
  ⊗^{ V}_{l} ((pr12 V) x2 y1 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
              · α^{ V }_{ y1, x2, y2})
· αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y1, x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2}
· (pr12 V) x1 y1 ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} (x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2)

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
(pr12 V) (x1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2) y1 ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} y2
· mon_rassociator y1 x1 x2 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
· mon_lassociator (y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x1) x2 y2 =
mon_lassociator x1 x2 y1 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
· mon_lassociator x1 (x2 ⊗ y1) y2
· x1
  ⊗^{ V}_{l} ((pr12 V) x2 y1 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
              · α^{ V }_{ y1, x2, y2})
· αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y1, x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2}
· (pr12 V) x1 y1 ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} (x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2)


    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
mon_lassociator x1 x2 y1 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
· mon_lassociator x1 (x2 ⊗ y1) y2
· x1
  ⊗^{ V}_{l} ((pr12 V) x2 y1 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
              · α^{ V }_{ y1, x2, y2})
· αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y1, x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2}
· (pr12 V) x1 y1 ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} (x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2) =
(pr12 V) (x1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2) y1 ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} y2
· mon_rassociator y1 x1 x2 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
· mon_lassociator (y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x1) x2 y2

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
(λ f : V
       ⟦ (x1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y1)
         ⊗_{ pr2 V} (x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2),
       (y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x1)
       ⊗_{ pr2 V} (x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2) ⟧,
 is_z_isomorphism f)
  ((pr22 (pr2 V)) (x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2)
     (x1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y1) (y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x1)
     ((pr12 V) x1 y1))
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
mon_lassociator x1 x2 y1 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
· mon_lassociator x1 (x2 ⊗ y1) y2
· x1
  ⊗^{ V}_{l} ((pr12 V) x2 y1 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
              · α^{ V }_{ y1, x2, y2})
· αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y1, x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2} =
(pr12 V) (x1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2) y1 ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} y2
· mon_rassociator y1 x1 x2 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
· mon_lassociator (y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x1) x2 y2
· inv_from_z_iso
    ((pr22 (pr2 V)) (x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2)
       (x1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y1) (y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x1)
       ((pr12 V) x1 y1),, ?pr2)

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
(λ f : V
       ⟦ (x1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y1)
         ⊗_{ pr2 V} (x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2),
       (y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x1)
       ⊗_{ pr2 V} (x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2) ⟧,
 is_z_isomorphism f)
  ((pr22 (pr2 V)) (x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2)
     (x1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y1) (y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x1)
     ((pr12 V) x1 y1))

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
is_z_isomorphism ((pr12 V) x1 y1)

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
is_inverse_in_precat ((pr12 V) x1 y1) ?Goal0

      apply (_ ,, monoidal_braiding_inverses V).
    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
mon_lassociator x1 x2 y1 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
· mon_lassociator x1 (x2 ⊗ y1) y2
· x1
  ⊗^{ V}_{l} ((pr12 V) x2 y1 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
              · α^{ V }_{ y1, x2, y2})
· αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y1, x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2} =
(pr12 V) (x1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2) y1 ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} y2
· mon_rassociator y1 x1 x2 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
· mon_lassociator (y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x1) x2 y2
· inv_from_z_iso
    ((pr22 (pr2 V)) (x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2)
       (x1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y1) (y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x1)
       ((pr12 V) x1 y1),,
     is_z_iso_rightwhiskering_z_iso V
       (x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2) ((pr12 V) x1 y1)
       (pr1
          (monoidal_braiding_data_inv V,,
           monoidal_braiding_inverses V) y1 x1,,
        (let X :=
           pr2
             (monoidal_braiding_data_inv V,,
              monoidal_braiding_inverses V) in
         X x1 y1)))

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
mon_lassociator x1 x2 y1 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
· mon_lassociator x1 (x2 ⊗ y1) y2
· x1
  ⊗^{ V}_{l} ((pr12 V) x2 y1 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
              · α^{ V }_{ y1, x2, y2})
· αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y1, x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2} =
(pr12 V) (x1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2) y1 ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} y2
· mon_rassociator y1 x1 x2 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
· mon_lassociator (y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x1) x2 y2
· pr1 V y1 x1 ⊗^{ V}_{r} (x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2)


    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
mon_lassociator x1 x2 y1 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
· mon_lassociator x1 (x2 ⊗ y1) y2
· x1
  ⊗^{ V}_{l} ((pr12 V) x2 y1 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
              · α^{ V }_{ y1, x2, y2})
· αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y1, x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2} = ?b

x1, x2, y1, y2: V
?b =
(pr12 V) (x1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2) y1 ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} y2
· mon_rassociator y1 x1 x2 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
· mon_lassociator (y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x1) x2 y2
· pr1 V y1 x1 ⊗^{ V}_{r} (x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2)

x1, x2, y1, y2: V

(pr12 V) (x1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2) y1 ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} y2
· mon_rassociator y1 x1 x2 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
· mon_lassociator (y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x1) x2 y2
· pr1 V y1 x1 ⊗^{ V}_{r} (x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2)

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
?b =
(pr12 V) (x1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2) y1 ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} y2
· mon_rassociator y1 x1 x2 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
· (mon_lassociator (y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x1) x2 y2
   · pr1 V y1 x1 ⊗^{ V}_{r} (x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2))

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
?t1 =
mon_lassociator (y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x1) x2 y2
· pr1 V y1 x1 ⊗^{ V}_{r} (x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2)

      apply pathsinv0, monoidal_associatornatright.
    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
mon_lassociator x1 x2 y1 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
· mon_lassociator x1 (x2 ⊗ y1) y2
· x1
  ⊗^{ V}_{l} ((pr12 V) x2 y1 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
              · α^{ V }_{ y1, x2, y2})
· αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y1, x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2} =

· mon_rassociator y1 x1 x2 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
· ((pr1 V y1 x1 ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} x2) ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} y2

· αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y1, x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2} = ?b

 · mon_rassociator y1 x1 x2
 · pr1 V y1 x1 ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} x2) ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2

?t1 =

· pr1 V y1 x1 ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} x2

V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
mon_lassociator x1 x2 y1 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
· mon_lassociator x1 (x2 ⊗ y1) y2
· x1
  ⊗^{ V}_{l} ((pr12 V) x2 y1 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
              · α^{ V }_{ y1, x2, y2})
· αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y1, x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2} =
(mon_lassociator x1 x2 y1
 · x1 ⊗^{ V}_{l} sym_mon_braiding V x2 y1
 · mon_rassociator x1 y1 x2) ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
· α^{ pr2 V }_{ x1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y1, x2, y2}


    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
mon_lassociator x1 x2 y1 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
· mon_lassociator x1 (x2 ⊗ y1) y2
· x1
  ⊗^{ V}_{l} ((pr12 V) x2 y1 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
              · α^{ V }_{ y1, x2, y2})
· αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y1, x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2} =
mon_lassociator x1 x2 y1 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
· (x1 ⊗^{ V}_{l} sym_mon_braiding V x2 y1)
  ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
· mon_rassociator x1 y1 x2 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
· α^{ pr2 V }_{ x1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y1, x2, y2}

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
mon_lassociator x1 x2 y1 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
· (mon_lassociator x1 (x2 ⊗ y1) y2
   · (x1
      ⊗^{ V}_{l} ((pr12 V) x2 y1 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
                  · α^{ V }_{ y1, x2, y2})
      · αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y1, x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2})) =
mon_lassociator x1 x2 y1 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
· ((x1 ⊗^{ V}_{l} sym_mon_braiding V x2 y1)
   ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
   · (mon_rassociator x1 y1 x2 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
      · α^{ pr2 V }_{ x1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y1, x2, y2}))

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
mon_lassociator x1 (x2 ⊗ y1) y2
· (x1
   ⊗^{ V}_{l} ((pr12 V) x2 y1 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
               · α^{ V }_{ y1, x2, y2})
   · αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y1, x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2}) =
(x1 ⊗^{ V}_{l} sym_mon_braiding V x2 y1) ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
· (mon_rassociator x1 y1 x2 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
   · α^{ pr2 V }_{ x1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y1, x2, y2})

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
mon_lassociator x1 (x2 ⊗ y1) y2
· x1
  ⊗^{ V}_{l} ((pr12 V) x2 y1 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
              · α^{ V }_{ y1, x2, y2})
· αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y1, x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2} =
(x1 ⊗^{ V}_{l} sym_mon_braiding V x2 y1) ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
· mon_rassociator x1 y1 x2 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
· α^{ pr2 V }_{ x1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y1, x2, y2}

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
mon_lassociator x1 (x2 ⊗ y1) y2
· (x1 ⊗^{ V}_{l} ((pr12 V) x2 y1 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2)
   · x1 ⊗^{ V}_{l} α^{ V }_{ y1, x2, y2})
· αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y1, x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2} =
(x1 ⊗^{ V}_{l} sym_mon_braiding V x2 y1) ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
· mon_rassociator x1 y1 x2 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
· α^{ pr2 V }_{ x1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y1, x2, y2}

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
mon_lassociator x1 (x2 ⊗ y1) y2
· x1 ⊗^{ V}_{l} ((pr12 V) x2 y1 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2)
· x1 ⊗^{ V}_{l} α^{ V }_{ y1, x2, y2}
· αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y1, x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2} =
(x1 ⊗^{ V}_{l} sym_mon_braiding V x2 y1) ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
· mon_rassociator x1 y1 x2 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
· α^{ pr2 V }_{ x1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y1, x2, y2}

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
α^{ V }_{ x1, x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y1, y2}
· x1 ⊗^{ V}_{l} ((pr12 V) x2 y1 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2)
· x1 ⊗^{ V}_{l} α^{ V }_{ y1, x2, y2}
· αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y1, x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2} =
(x1 ⊗^{ V}_{l} pr2 V x2 y1) ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
· mon_rassociator x1 y1 x2 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
· α^{ pr2 V }_{ x1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y1, x2, y2}

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
α^{ V }_{ x1, x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y1, y2}
· x1 ⊗^{ V}_{l} ((pr12 V) x2 y1 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2)
· x1 ⊗^{ V}_{l} α^{ V }_{ y1, x2, y2}
· αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y1, x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2} =
(x1 ⊗^{ V}_{l} (pr12 V) x2 y1) ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
· mon_rassociator x1 y1 x2 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
· α^{ pr2 V }_{ x1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y1, x2, y2}

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
(x1 ⊗^{ V}_{l} (pr12 V) x2 y1) ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
· α^{ V }_{ x1, y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2, y2}
· x1 ⊗^{ V}_{l} α^{ V }_{ y1, x2, y2}
· αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y1, x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2} =
(x1 ⊗^{ V}_{l} (pr12 V) x2 y1) ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
· mon_rassociator x1 y1 x2 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
· α^{ pr2 V }_{ x1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y1, x2, y2}

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
(x1 ⊗^{ V}_{l} (pr12 V) x2 y1) ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
· (α^{ V }_{ x1, y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2, y2}
   · (x1 ⊗^{ V}_{l} α^{ V }_{ y1, x2, y2}
      · αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y1, x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2})) =
(x1 ⊗^{ V}_{l} (pr12 V) x2 y1) ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
· (mon_rassociator x1 y1 x2 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
   · α^{ pr2 V }_{ x1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y1, x2, y2})

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
α^{ V }_{ x1, y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2, y2}
· (x1 ⊗^{ V}_{l} α^{ V }_{ y1, x2, y2}
   · αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y1, x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2}) =
mon_rassociator x1 y1 x2 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
· α^{ pr2 V }_{ x1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y1, x2, y2}

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
α^{ V }_{ x1, y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2, y2}
· x1 ⊗^{ V}_{l} α^{ V }_{ y1, x2, y2}
· αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y1, x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2} =
mon_rassociator x1 y1 x2 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
· α^{ pr2 V }_{ x1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y1, x2, y2}

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
mon_rassociator x1 y1 x2 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
· α^{ pr2 V }_{ x1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y1, x2, y2} =
α^{ V }_{ x1, y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2, y2}
· x1 ⊗^{ V}_{l} α^{ V }_{ y1, x2, y2}
· αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y1, x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2}

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
(λ g : V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2),
       x1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2 ⟧,
 is_inverse_in_precat
   (mon_lassociator x1 y1 (x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2)) g)
  (mon_rassociator x1 y1 (x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2))
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
α^{ V }_{ x1, y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2, y2}
· x1 ⊗^{ V}_{l} α^{ V }_{ y1, x2, y2} =
mon_rassociator x1 y1 x2 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
· α^{ pr2 V }_{ x1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y1, x2, y2}
· (mon_lassociator x1 y1 (x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2),,
   mon_rassociator x1 y1 (x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2),, ?pr2)

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
(λ g : V ⟦ x1 ⊗ (y1 ⊗ x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2),
       x1 ⊗ y1 ⊗ x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2 ⟧,
 is_inverse_in_precat
   (mon_lassociator x1 y1 (x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2)) g)
  (mon_rassociator x1 y1 (x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2))

      apply monoidal_associatorisolaw.
    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
α^{ V }_{ x1, y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2, y2}
· x1 ⊗^{ V}_{l} α^{ V }_{ y1, x2, y2} =
mon_rassociator x1 y1 x2 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
· α^{ pr2 V }_{ x1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y1, x2, y2}
· (mon_lassociator x1 y1 (x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2),,
   mon_rassociator x1 y1 (x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2),,
   monoidal_associatorisolaw (pr2 V) x1 y1
     (x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2))

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
α^{ V }_{ x1, y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2, y2}
· x1 ⊗^{ V}_{l} α^{ V }_{ y1, x2, y2} =
mon_rassociator x1 y1 x2 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
· α^{ pr2 V }_{ x1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y1, x2, y2}
· mon_lassociator x1 y1 (x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2)

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
α^{ V }_{ x1, y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2, y2}
· x1 ⊗^{ V}_{l} α^{ V }_{ y1, x2, y2} =
mon_rassociator x1 y1 x2 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
· (α^{ pr2 V }_{ x1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y1, x2, y2}
   · mon_lassociator x1 y1 (x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2))

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
α^{ V }_{ x1, y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2, y2}
· x1 ⊗^{ V}_{l} α^{ V }_{ y1, x2, y2} = ?b
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
?b =
mon_rassociator x1 y1 x2 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
· (α^{ pr2 V }_{ x1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y1, x2, y2}
   · mon_lassociator x1 y1 (x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2))

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
?b =
mon_rassociator x1 y1 x2 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
· (α^{ pr2 V }_{ x1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y1, x2, y2}
   · mon_lassociator x1 y1 (x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2))

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
?t1 =
α^{ pr2 V }_{ x1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y1, x2, y2}
· mon_lassociator x1 y1 (x2 ⊗_{ pr2 V} y2)

      apply pathsinv0, mon_lassociator_lassociator.
    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
α^{ V }_{ x1, y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2, y2}
· x1 ⊗^{ V}_{l} α^{ V }_{ y1, x2, y2} =
mon_rassociator x1 y1 x2 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
· (mon_lassociator x1 y1 x2 #⊗ identity y2
   · mon_lassociator x1 (y1 ⊗ x2) y2
   · identity x1 #⊗ mon_lassociator y1 x2 y2)

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
α^{ V }_{ x1, y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2, y2}
· x1 ⊗^{ V}_{l} α^{ V }_{ y1, x2, y2} =
mon_rassociator x1 y1 x2 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
· (mon_lassociator x1 y1 x2 ⊗^{ pr2 V} identity y2
   · mon_lassociator x1 (y1 ⊗ x2) y2
   · identity x1 ⊗^{ pr2 V} mon_lassociator y1 x2 y2)

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
α^{ V }_{ x1, y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2, y2}
· x1 ⊗^{ V}_{l} α^{ V }_{ y1, x2, y2} =
mon_rassociator x1 y1 x2 ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
· (α^{ V }_{ x1, y1, x2} ⊗^{ pr2 V} identity y2
   · α^{ V }_{ x1, y1 ⊗ x2, y2}
   · identity x1 ⊗^{ pr2 V} α^{ V }_{ y1, x2, y2})

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
α^{ V }_{ x1, y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2, y2}
· x1 ⊗^{ V}_{l} α^{ V }_{ y1, x2, y2} =
αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y1, x2} ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
· (α^{ V }_{ x1, y1, x2} ⊗^{ pr2 V} identity y2
   · α^{ V }_{ x1, y1 ⊗ x2, y2}
   · identity x1 ⊗^{ pr2 V} α^{ V }_{ y1, x2, y2})

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
α^{ V }_{ x1, y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2, y2}
· x1 ⊗^{ V}_{l} α^{ V }_{ y1, x2, y2} =
αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y1, x2} ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
· (α^{ V }_{ x1, y1, x2} ⊗^{ pr2 V} identity y2
   · α^{ V }_{ x1, y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2, y2}
   · identity x1 ⊗^{ pr2 V} α^{ V }_{ y1, x2, y2})

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
α^{ V }_{ x1, y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2, y2}
· x1 ⊗^{ V}_{l} α^{ V }_{ y1, x2, y2} =
αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y1, x2} ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
· (α^{ V }_{ x1, y1, x2} ⊗^{ pr2 V} identity y2
   · α^{ V }_{ x1, y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2, y2}
   · identity x1 ⊗^{ pr2 V} α^{ V }_{ y1, x2, y2})

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
α^{ V }_{ x1, y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2, y2}
· x1 ⊗^{ V}_{l} α^{ V }_{ y1, x2, y2} =
αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y1, x2} ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
· α^{ V }_{ x1, y1, x2} ⊗^{ pr2 V} identity y2
· α^{ V }_{ x1, y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2, y2}
· identity x1 ⊗^{ pr2 V} α^{ V }_{ y1, x2, y2}

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
α^{ V }_{ x1, y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2, y2}
· x1 ⊗^{ V}_{l} α^{ V }_{ y1, x2, y2} =
αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y1, x2} ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
· α^{ V }_{ x1, y1, x2} ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
· α^{ V }_{ x1, y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2, y2}
· identity x1 ⊗^{ pr2 V} α^{ V }_{ y1, x2, y2}

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
α^{ V }_{ x1, y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2, y2}
· x1 ⊗^{ V}_{l} α^{ V }_{ y1, x2, y2} =
(αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y1, x2} · α^{ V }_{ x1, y1, x2})
⊗^{ V}_{r} y2 · α^{ V }_{ x1, y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2, y2}
· identity x1 ⊗^{ pr2 V} α^{ V }_{ y1, x2, y2}

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
α^{ V }_{ x1, y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2, y2}
· x1 ⊗^{ V}_{l} α^{ V }_{ y1, x2, y2} = ?b
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
?b =
(αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y1, x2} · α^{ V }_{ x1, y1, x2})
⊗^{ V}_{r} y2 · α^{ V }_{ x1, y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2, y2}
· identity x1 ⊗^{ pr2 V} α^{ V }_{ y1, x2, y2}

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
?b =
(αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y1, x2} · α^{ V }_{ x1, y1, x2})
⊗^{ V}_{r} y2 · α^{ V }_{ x1, y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2, y2}
· identity x1 ⊗^{ pr2 V} α^{ V }_{ y1, x2, y2}

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
?y =
(αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y1, x2} · α^{ V }_{ x1, y1, x2})
⊗^{ V}_{r} y2

      
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
?t1 = αinv^{ V }_{ x1, y1, x2} · α^{ V }_{ x1, y1, x2}

      apply pathsinv0, (monoidal_associatorisolaw V).
    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
α^{ V }_{ x1, y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2, y2}
· x1 ⊗^{ V}_{l} α^{ V }_{ y1, x2, y2} =
identity (x1 ⊗_{ V} (y1 ⊗_{ V} x2)) ⊗^{ V}_{r} y2
· α^{ V }_{ x1, y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2, y2}
· identity x1 ⊗^{ pr2 V} α^{ V }_{ y1, x2, y2}

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
α^{ V }_{ x1, y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2, y2}
· x1 ⊗^{ V}_{l} α^{ V }_{ y1, x2, y2} =
identity ((x1 ⊗_{ V} (y1 ⊗_{ V} x2)) ⊗_{ V} y2)
· α^{ V }_{ x1, y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2, y2}
· identity x1 ⊗^{ pr2 V} α^{ V }_{ y1, x2, y2}

    
V: sym_monoidal_cat
x1, x2, y1, y2: V
α^{ V }_{ x1, y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2, y2}
· x1 ⊗^{ V}_{l} α^{ V }_{ y1, x2, y2} =
α^{ V }_{ x1, y1 ⊗_{ pr2 V} x2, y2}
· identity x1 ⊗^{ pr2 V} α^{ V }_{ y1, x2, y2}

    now rewrite (when_bifunctor_becomes_leftwhiskering V).
  Qed.

End Swapping.
